[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121874439/590864090/-1547462091?refcode=AU_GWN_CL_GEN_NOA_AC_20251223_PM1_V1_S1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjEvMS84ODMxNCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI4YWQxNTE3Ni01YmUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=It0mt3F3newxFDoiG5lpDcMZ6Gc5E4P15hqlyRBnk4I=) After a long and busy year, I’m looking forward to taking a step back and spending some quality time with Caroline and the kids. name: Robert Garcia
subject: We took Donald Trump to court — and won
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress
body:
This is what oversight looks like
# [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121875291/590872039/938567526?refcode=header&noskip=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWY4N2NmMC01Y2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxggBs5kKyy6r3z1LUlpZaENTnLpPVVlVv7uXRBG7_8=)
This summer, I took the Trump–Vance administration to court.
They tried to block members of Congress from entering federal immigration detention facilities — from seeing conditions with our own eyes, from asking questions, from doing the oversight the Constitution demands.
_We didn’t back down. We sued._
**And this week, a federal court ruled clearly and unequivocally: the Trump–Vance administration cannot block Congress from conducting oversight at immigration detention facilities.**
**[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121875292/590872040/789508428?refcode=251223_RG_trump-court-fr&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMTIvMS85MTcxOSIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJkOWY4N2NmMC01Y2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=xxggBs5kKyy6r3z1LUlpZaENTnLpPVVlVv7uXRBG7_8=)**
That win matters. It means no administration — Republican or Democrat — gets to hide abuse, neglect, or corruption behind locked doors. It means accountability still exists. And it proves something important: when Democrats fight, we can win.
**[That’s why I’m emailing you today. These wins don’t come cheap. Fighting back against this lawless administration comes with costs. And I’m counting on you to help us stay strong in this fight so that we can continue holding Donald Trump’s feet to the fire. That’s why oversight matters so much. It’s why I ran for Congress. And it’s why I’m not done.

clean_body: This is what oversight looks like = This summer, I took the Trump–Vance administration to court. They tried to block members of Congress from entering federal immigration detention facilities — from seeing conditions with our own eyes, from asking questions, from doing the oversight the Constitution demands. We didn’t back down. We sued. And this week, a federal court ruled clearly and unequivocally: the Trump–Vance administration cannot block Congress from conducting oversight at immigration detention facilities. = That win matters. It means no administration — Republican or Democrat — gets to hide abuse, neglect, or corruption behind locked doors. It means accountability still exists. And it proves something important: when Democrats fight, we can win. = this victory is important, it's just one battle. Donald Trump’s record is a mountain of scandals: abuse of power, corruption, lawlessness, cruelty toward immigrants, and efforts to silence anyone who tries to hold him accountable. This administration will keep pushing the limits unless someone pushes back harder. That’s why oversight matters so much. It’s why I ran for Congress. And it’s why I’m not done. = = Thank you, Robert Garcia = * Paid for by Robert Garcia for Congress Robert Garcia for Congress 65 Pine Ave #348 Long Beach, CA 90802 United States This email was sent to . We try to send only the most important information and opportunities to participate via email, but click to unsubscribe.

https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
Friends,
I hope you’re enjoying the holiday season with family and friends. Our December 31 fundraising deadline [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor] is coming up fast, and we have just 8 days left! This deadline is an important moment that helps keep our campaign moving forward and builds the energy we need to carry our message into the new year.
As a father, educator, public school parent, social worker, and public servant, I’ve dedicated my life to fighting for working families and opportunity for all. Now I’m running for Governor, and we are building a grassroots campaign that puts people first, not special interests.
If you are able, please consider supporting our campaign today [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor] to help us finish the year strong. A contribution of $50, $150, $250, $500, $1,000 , or any amount you can give will make a real difference.
You can donate online: Here [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/thurmondforgovernor]
If you would like to make your donation via check, please mail to:
Tony Thurmond for Governor 2026 (FPPC# 1461509)
312 Clay Street, Suite 300
Oakland, CA 94607
Thank you for your support, and I wish you a happy and healthy New Year!
With gratitude,
Tony

name: Carmela Conroy
subject: Wishing you a joyful holiday - and an invitation to ring in 2026 together!
body:
| | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | | **Victory is within reach.** Your early investment builds the momentum needed to win. [**DONATE NOW >**](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=72104352d6&e=a7b299e420)
---
[|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=a435176c66&e=a7b299e420)
| | | | | |
Peter -

**As the year comes to a close, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season.**

This past year has brought real challenges for many of our neighbors. Through it all, I’ve been deeply inspired by your commitment to our shared values and to building a future where Eastern Washington communities don’t just get by – we truly thrive.

The holidays offer a chance to pause, reflect, and reconnect with what matters most: family, friends, community, and our responsibility to care for one another.

No matter how you’re celebrating, I hope this season brings you rest, joy, and meaningful time with the people you love.

As we look ahead, my team and I are ready to hit the ground running in 2026 – and we’d love to kick off the new year with you.

**You’re invited to join us at one – or both – of Team Conroy’s New Year’s Eve celebrations as we ring in the year and kick off our 2026 campaign to bring accountable representation back to Washington’s 5th Congressional District. See below for more event information and to RSVP:**
---
[|
---](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=04e9f96b59&e=a7b299e420)
| | [_**Capacity is limited - be sure to secure your spot today!**_](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=19b8265cf5&e=a7b299e420)
---
| [RSVP](https://conroy4congress.us17.list-manage.com/track/click?u=dc047fbc65030d4c4bcc44d19&id=17f755c39d&e=a7b299e420)
---
| | Thank you for being part of Team Eastern Washington. I’m so grateful to have you by my side, and I hope to see you on New Year's Eve!

– Carmela Conroy
---

name: Britney VanCitters
subject: Re: Have you been to an OLCV Lobby Day?
body:
Hi Peter,
It’s a busy time of year, but our planet and climate is vital, so I want to make sure you saw my last email. Meeting with legislators and speaking with them is an essential part of making sure they know our communities’ priorities. Lobby Day gets constituents trained and ready for meetings with their lawmakers. Our volunteers look forward to Lobby Days for the advocacy opportunity and time to connect with like-minded folks across communities, and we need your help to keep them going.
Keep Lobby Days going! [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2?am=20&amtOpts=&recurringAm=20&recurringAmtOpts=&is_optimized_ask=true&contactdata=zxrI0cuT4ki8qZ2VDZNQ0rdnHlnZ/bbLyMPIQRIOghz8PN6GOkdHT6spVmFJtr3K6n153sYBAES5k1yPkhet75pQ41vFwz4TVn2vl4Y4aqKgvyuc63ETt1I3vF5fJ/dJ]
Will you give a generous gift of $100 now so we can host another Lobby Day? [https://secure.ngpvan.com/t28-fgcXRUmjEwNoP96SgQ2]
Thank you for what you do,
[https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/AV/AVLCV/1/70877/images/Britney_signature-removebg-preview.png]
Britney VanCitters (she/her)

This year, for the first time since the pandemic, we were able to host an in-person Lobby Day. Not only was it fun to return to hosting this important event in-person, but it was a meaningful and impactful experience for our volunteers. Here is a testimonial from OLCV volunteer Rick Reynolds from West Linn:
I've been so impressed by OLCV and their Lobby Days. The expert trainers do a remarkable job of quickly preparing us to engage with our legislators productively. We've all had so much fun, too, and I look forward to the next events!
These Lobby Days are only possible with your generosity .
It costs $4,000 to host an OLCV Lobby Day, and all of these funds come from our generous donors. If we could get 40 donors to give $100 right now, we can fund a future OLCV Lobby Day. name: GOTV PAC
subject: Our last planning meeting before 2026
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY GET OUT THE VOTE PAC NOT AUTHORIZED BY ANY CANDIDATE OR ANY CANDIDATE'S COMMITTEE
body:
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09042025&amount=25]
Peter ,
We met this week for the last time before 2026 today to discuss our gameplan for next year.
Right now, we see 12 congressional races that are true flip opportunities for Democrats. These are races we can absolutely win. We know the districts, we know the voters, and we know exactly what it takes to turn turnout into victories, but that’s not the whole map.
There are another 21 races that could become competitive with the right early investment – strong organizing, smart targeting, and the ability to move quickly as conditions change. These are the kinds of races that don’t stay competitive by accident, they become competitive because someone decides to show up early.
That’s what GOTV PAC is built to do.
The question in front of us now is: How many of these races can we afford to help?
Your contribution today directly determines the answer. Every dollar expands the field to more districts where Democrats aren’t playing defense, but going on offense. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12382025]
If you've saved your payment information with ActBlue Express, your donation will go through immediately:

Custom Donation [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email12382025]
If you believe 2026 shouldn’t come down to a handful of razor-thin margins, chip in now to help us scale up while there’s still time to do it right.
Thanks for being part of these conversations – and for helping turn plans into wins.
GOTV PAC
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/gotvpacemq2?refcode=Email09212025&amount=25]
Get Out the Vote PAC mobilizes voters often overlooked by mainstream campaigns to help Democratic candidates win in the most competitive districts.
Our professional phone bankers specialize in long- and short-term GOTV campaigns, event registration, voting assistance in heavily gerrymandered states, fundraising, and call time management. Our mission is to flip red districts blue, any elected position from dog walker to Congress member.
Learn more at: gotv.vote [https://www.gotv.vote/]

I'm sorry to pester you again, null.

But we're still $17,850 short of our urgent $100,000 goal – and the deadline is at midnight tomorrow.
Null, I know you support our movement, but could you do me a favor and make your first gift right now? Even $5 or $10 helps. I'd truly be so grateful.
Here's your personalized link: **[secure.actblue.com/donate/hs_mw_2025_email_fr/dpwillis67@gmail.com](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10706?t=2&akid=1702%2E49239%2EbkvulU)**
Thank you so much,
Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10707?t=3&akid=1702%2E49239%2EbkvulU) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10708?t=4&akid=1702%2E49239%2EbkvulU)

body:
| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121875740/590898611/-1798313451?refcode=em-header&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNTAvMS8xMDM1MzYiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiZjAyYjcwZTYtNjNlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=WRqqpzjZBV3-ntTRWg0UetHq9NcOdrLbo_PM-3PToBc=) Hi friend, As we spend quality time with our families and loved ones, I can’t help but reflect on how grateful I am for every one of you in our Los Angeles community. I truly admire the resilience and strength we have collectively shown this year. It is fitting that this period is about standing together, celebrating our community, and casting light, warmth, and joy. We have come through the year stronger, and I am hopeful for what 2026 will bring. But for now, I simply want to say thank you, friend. And however you celebrate, I'm wishing you a happy holiday. Laura

body:

| | | | [](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
---
Some people are saying: **This is SAD!**
I’m sitting here. Alone. In the war room. Fighting for you. The rest of the staff went home hours ago. It’s just me, one dying laptop, and a countdown clock to my urgent end-of-year deadline.
**[We are going to have to ACT FAST!](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)**
[HOLD THE LINE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
If we don’t crush my urgent end-of-year deadline, the radical Left flips the House and Senate in 2026 and finishes what they started:
* **Open borders forever**
* **Your guns confiscated**
* **Your kids brainwashed**

**_And worst of all, your favorite President (ME!) might just go through another FAKE impeachment!_**

They’re already spending BILLIONS (Dirty Money, I bet) to bury US and bury YOU! I need a small sacrifice from every red-blooded American who wants to save the country!
**_[I’m dead serious: miss this goal and the MAGA Movement crumbles>>](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)_**
If you rush $47 RIGHT NOW (in the next 30 minutes), I’ll personally send you my limited-edition MAGA Christmas gift — but that’s nothing compared to losing the country.
[This is it. No second chances.](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
****We have been fighting for years.. And I fear the end is near. The woke mind virus is infiltrating more and more Americans every day. This could be our last chance!

[HOLD THE LINE](https://link.win.donaldjtrump.)
Do it for America, show them MAGA is strong!
THANK YOU,
President Trump

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Trump launched strikes without Congress
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Justice Democrats
body:
I’m demanding answers. Will you have our back?
#
Peter,
**FIRST:** Donald Trump ordered military strikes in the Caribbean without congressional approval, without transparency, and without a plan to protect civilians or U.S. personnel.
That’s a direct violation of the Constitution and Congress’s sole authority to declare war.
**THEN:** I called on Pete Hegseth and Admiral Bradley to testify before Congress and explain who authorized these strikes, why Congress was cut out, and what risks were ignored.
As a senior member of the House Armed Services Committee, I refuse to stay silent while presidents wage war in the dark.
**NOW:** The war profiteers are coming after me and other Justice Democrats.
**[Before I explain, will you rush a split contribution to my campaign and the Justice Democrats to show that you have our back?](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251223-2-rk.ZoG1JD&refcode=em20251223-37307&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=2&akid=37307%2E1203867%2E_YAo6_)**
Defense contractors, hawkish lobbyists, and the same forces that sold us the Iraq War don’t want hearings. They don’t want oversight. And they definitely don’t want members of Congress saying no to regime-change wars – whether in Venezuela or anywhere else.
I started my political career opposing the Iraq War. I learned early what happens when Congress surrenders its power and lets lies and money drive us into endless conflict. I won’t back down now.
If you have our back in this fight, I need you to show it today.
**[Please rush a split contribution to my campaign and Justice Democrats to help us stand up to war profiteers, demand accountability, and stop unauthorized war before it escalates.](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251223-2-rk.ZoG1JD&refcode=em20251223-37307&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=3&akid=37307%2E1203867%2E_YAo6_)**
**[Contribute $5](https://go.justicedemocrats.com/go/140221?c0=jd-em-20251223-2-rk.ZoG1JD&refcode=em20251223-37307&amounts=10%2C27%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&amount=5&t=22&akid=37307%2E1203867%2E_YAo6_)**
Thank you for standing with me and standing for democracy, for the Constitution, and for peace.
Onward,
Ro

**[Donate](https://secure.actblue.com/donate/justicedemocrats?refcode=em20251223-37307-footer&t=23&refcode2=37307_1203867__YAo6_&akid=37307%2E1203867%2E_YAo6_)**

For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, **I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent.** That work exists because **God carried me** through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. **_This campaign is no different._** It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late **Charlie Kirk.** After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--_nor do I intend to become one_ --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. **I knew I had to do something. ** _Thankfully_ , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. clean_body: Reclaiming our future The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, and safeguard freedom. | | | | | Hi Fellow Patriot, My name is Victor Marx -- a husband of 37 years, father of five, grandfather, Marine Corps veteran, former pastor, and humanitarian who has spent decades serving families and communities around the world. I am also the conservative in the race for Governor of Colorado. I'm running because the challenges we're facing here reflect the challenges facing our entire nation. What happens in one state can strengthen -- or weaken -- the future of America. For years, my calling has taken me into some of the most difficult places imaginable. From war zones to trafficking corridors to communities devastated by violence, I 've led more than 150 high-risk missions focused on rescuing and restoring the innocent. That work exists because God carried me through a childhood marked by trauma, instability, and hardship. Through His grace, I rebuilt my life -- and I've spent every day since fighting for those who can't fight for themselves. This campaign is no different. It isn't powered by insiders or special interests. It's powered by people who still believe in Faith, Family, Freedom, and the promise of a stronger America. We're already building real momentum, and we need to keep it going. I want you with us in this fight, Over the years, I've been blessed to walk alongside men and women of deep conviction--people who don't just speak about change but embody it in the way they live. One of those rare leaders I held in the highest regard was my friend, the late Charlie Kirk. After Charlie passed, his wife Erika told me that Charlie would want me to run, and she encouraged me to throw my hat in the ring. While I've never considered myself a politician--nor do I intend to become one --I reached a point where I couldn't ignore the reality that our communities are being failed. I knew I had to do something. Thankfully , I'm not stepping into this fight alone. Thousands of patriots have already taken their place in this movement, The values that guide me are simple: protect families, defend faith, safeguard freedom, and steward the natural beauty we 've been entrusted with. These are not just Colorado values -- they 're American values. The struggles we face here -- crime, government overreach, attacks on faith, rising costs -- are the same challenges pressing on families across the country. Turning Colorado around sends a message far beyond our borders: that courage still matters, that conviction still wins, and that ordinary Americans can reclaim their future. I believe deeply in that mission. I 've lived it my entire life. And I'm grateful to have so many determined patriots standing alongside me as we work toward a safer, stronger, more united future. | | For Colorado and for America, Victor Marx P.S. If you've gotten this far, there's something I need you to know: You 're not just someone reading an email -- you're someone whose voice and values matter deeply in shaping the direction of this mission. , and your involvement strengthens the momentum we've already begun to build. -Victor | | | | | ---|---|---|---|--- | | PAID FOR BY VICTOR MARX FOR GOVERNOR Registered Agent: Gregory Carlson | | P.O. Box 156 Florence, CO 81226

subject: The gravity of the situation
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Democracy on the Line PAC
body:
We can’t afford to disengage or turn away.

|
---
Peter, this is Adam Schiff.

Lately, I’ve been thinking a lot about the gravity of the situation we’re facing.

**[I want to share some thoughts with you — but before I do, will you pitch in any amount to my campaign and Democracy On The Line before our end-of-quarter deadline?](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121876530/590910388/2088414854?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20251223_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYjIxOTRjLTZjZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyALiBCL7n6tpGztKmoyPD180gaAQozlejrDxVx-_HM=)** **[](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121876531/590910389/2088414854?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20251223_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYjIxOTRjLTZjZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyALiBCL7n6tpGztKmoyPD180gaAQozlejrDxVx-_HM=)** | ****[PITCH IN »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121876532/590910390/2088414854?amount=10&refcode=DOTL_20251223_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYjIxOTRjLTZjZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyALiBCL7n6tpGztKmoyPD180gaAQozlejrDxVx-_HM=)****
---
We are living in unprecedented times. Never before has our country faced such deep threats to our democracy.

Health insurance costs are ballooning because they took money out of health care for a tax cut for rich people. People are worried about making ends meet. Housing costs are skyrocketing.

Meanwhile, Trump and his allies in Congress are more interested in going after their rivals than fixing these economic crises.

It's a lot, and I understand why you might want a break.

But we can’t afford to disengage or turn away. There are too many important fights that we must continue to wage — for an economy that works for everyone, for our democracy, and for the health and safety of us all.

The future is not set; it is up to us, and we can make all the difference.

And there are good reasons for hope. Millions of Americans have come out to protest against the president. Courts are ruling in our favor. And we scored important victories last month in California, New Jersey, and Virginia.

**[To prepare for the battles ahead, I'm humbly asking for your support today. So Peter, can I count on you to chip in any amount you can to Democracy On The Line and me to support my fight to defend our democracy and deliver for working people? Your support makes a huge difference ahead of our quarterly deadline. »](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121876533/590910391/2088414854?amount=7&refcode=DOTL_20251223_EMSPL_E3_T0_AC&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9FQS9FQTAxNS8xLzk0MjI1IiwNCiAgIkRpc3RyaWJ1dGlvblVuaXF1ZUlkIjogIjZmYjIxOTRjLTZjZTAtZjAxMS04MTk1LTAwMGQzYTFkNThhYSIsDQogICJFbWFpbEFkZHJlc3MiOiAiZHB3aWxsaXM2N0BnbWFpbC5jb20iDQp9&hmac=dyALiBCL7n6tpGztKmoyPD180gaAQozlejrDxVx-_HM=)**

subject: Touching base about your local Post Office
disclaimer_text: Paid for by VPP
body:
Did you mean to do this?
| **Did you mean to leave your signature spot BLANK on our petition standing with the U.S. Postal Service?**

Trump wants to fire THOUSANDS of USPS employees, shut down Post Offices, and even PRIVATIZE the service that millions of Americans depend on!

If we don’t hit our 50,000 signature goal, Trump will think no one cares about the Postal Service... we MUST prove him wrong! [**_Sign in the next 2 minutes »_**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=6&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2) | [ADD MY NAME: STAND WITH USPS »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=7&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
---
Thank you,

_The Voter Protection Project Outreach Team_
**—BEGIN FORWARDED MESSAGE—**
This news should terrify all of us:
[](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=8&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
Trump KNOWS that mail-in voters helped secure President Biden’s 2020 victory and Democratic victories across the country this year.

**He’ll do anything to DISENFRANCHISE millions of blue voters even if it means DESTROYING USPS entirely! We MUST fight back.**

[**Sign on to STAND WITH THE U.S. POSTAL SERVICE »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=9&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2) | [SIGN OUR PETITION TO STAND WITH THE POSTAL SERVICE AND SAVE VOTE-BY-MAIL »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=10&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
---
People DEPEND on our Post Office -- but Trump is running it to the ground. **_NO!!_**

**We know good Democrats like you care about preserving this amazing institution. So we’re _pleading with you_ to act:**
[**Sign on to stand with the Postal Service against MAGA cuts »**](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=11&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
[2,000 LOCAL RESPONSES DUE TONIGHT: ADD YOUR NAME »](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/stand-with-postal/?source=VPP_20251223_EMPET_E5_T0_NS&t=12&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
---
Please, we need 2,000 responses from your state by MIDNIGHT tonight!

_The Voter Protection Project_
878179
| | Paid for by VPP
(www.protectvoting.org)
Not authorized by any candidate or candidate's committee. 401 2nd Ave. S, Ste. 303, Seattle, WA 98104

The Voter Protection Project is on an important mission: To end partisan gerrymandering and voter suppression by electing candidates at the state and federal levels that are forceful advocates for voting rights. Our enfranchisement agenda includes working to ensure that every state has automatic voter registration and online voter registration, convenient early voting, and independent redistricting commissions to ensure politicians are not able to draw their own maps.

Please, consider making a [one-time contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/121?t=1&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2). **Or, to make the most powerful lasting impact and help us oust Republicans up and down the ballot who attack our right to vote, make a[monthly sustaining contribution by clicking here](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/122?t=2&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2).**

[Click here](https://act.protectvoting.org/signup/fewer-emails/?t=3&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2) to request fewer emails. Click here to [unsubscribe](https://act.protectvoting.org/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?t=13&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2). | | [Please: Pitch In Once A Month To Protect Voting Rights »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/123?t=4&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)
---
[Donate Just One Time »](https://act.protectvoting.org/go/124?t=5&akid=22372%2E878179%2EKqFpd2)

subject: My trial begins after Christmas
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Rudy Defense Trust
body:
No matter what happens...

| Dear Friend,
---
There comes a point in every man’s life when you wonder how history will remember you.
---
No matter what happens in my RIGGED trial, I know with absolute confidence that history will say: **_“Rudy W. Giuliani was a fighter.”_**
---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zs0skvgo02tclppsd0v40l4v3kqqb0kniv665k88_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljm2o33cjh2bs)
__
---
**I fought the Mafia, I fought violent criminals, I fought corruption, I fought the Deep State agents who tried to frame and destroy my client – President Trump.**
---
_Now, at 81 years old, rather than fighting for someone else’s freedom and justice, I find myself fighting for my** _own_**._
---
**That’s why I officially filed a NEW _Defense_ _Trust_ in the conservative-friendly state of Florida that will give me _more power_ to fight the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for LIFE – with my trial beginning on _January 5_.**
---
_Friend, I am going to be brutally honest with you: right now, I lack the necessary means to fully fund my Defense Trust. Trust me, admitting that is not my strong suit._
---
But to beat the bloodthirsty vengeful Democrats, I’m going to need every cent I can get.
---
_I’m going up against the machine that let James Comey and Letitia James off the hook – the machine that had me and the President ARRESTED in the most violent jail in America._
---
With your help, history will forever remember that we took on the machine – and _WON_!
---
_But, if you can’t give right now (I know we’re in the midst of the holidays, and you likely have a lot on your plate and your mind), then please just carry on with your day._
---
[**But if you can, please make a contribution to my brand new “Rudy Defense Trust” to help me fight for my freedom and justice and beat the Left’s FINAL attempt to imprison me for life.**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zr9gg38v806pj00ss0fdgib38a74vudddtt0o5ao_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljm2o33cjh2bs)

name: Dan Steiner
subject: This is how revival spreads
body:
Right now, all across the country, hearts are being stirred.

| | | [](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z0k23hdpan6k0st1li98c8qj24s1n7l5v6cp8d4g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
Friend, Right now, all across the country, hearts are being stirred. Young people are showing up to worship with tears in their eyes.
Parents are praying over their children with new urgency.
Neighbors who never used to talk about faith are suddenly asking honest questions. **This isn’t a trend. It's hunger.** A hunger for truth. For hope. For Jesus. And God is calling His people to be ready. “The harvest truly is plentiful, but the laborers are few.”
—Matthew 9:37 (NKJV) That’s why we created a free resource for every believer (not just pastors or missionaries) who wants to be ready to share Jesus with boldness and love: [**_How to Share Jesus: 9 Practical Steps to Lead Others to Christ_**](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z5he1i1g3ppu14264i7fs6m73clt5hlggpc0plmg_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs) Inside, you’ll learn how to:
---
* Start from your own walk with Jesus
* Understand what the gospel really is (and what it’s not)
* Overcome fear and speak with clarity and love
* Extend the invitation and walk with new believers
* Trust the Holy Spirit as He leads you

---
[](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2z4iepdou20ju58l2fjtagru0vlk8dn9joqumm608_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
_**[Click here to get your free copy.>>](http://e.goppresidential.com/rd/9z2zkpg1qcuu7149gs5u7ak9l6d5hmbvvpj248r145o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)**_ At PreBorn!, we see this hunger every day in our Network Clinics. Women arrive overwhelmed. Some don’t even believe in God. But through the kindness of our staff and the power of the gospel, they encounter Christ and everything changes. You don’t have to work in a clinic to see that kind of transformation. You just have to be willing. Let’s not miss this moment.
God is stirring hearts. Let’s be ready to speak. In Christ,
Dan Steiner
President, PreBorn!
---

Pop Acta Media | GOP Presidential
---
_PO Box 2221 Fort Collins, CO 80522_

name: Kirk Cameron
subject: Children need to know
body:
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.

| | |
---
| |
---
Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth:
---
**“I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13**
---
Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. **[That’s why I’m hoping you will take just one simple action today to help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow and God’s word.](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z6pejbd28pt19kend6e30gshj2errbe1jmcc4390_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)** With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named **BRAVE Books** , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man.
---
| | [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zj5ehplhn1fj9inn3ft02ni8d3g5ik9p8r3615o8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
| That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
| | That’s exactly why **BRAVE Books** started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2z2uqb44jivgtoa6s0bs91j17i0kkifnkq8b9b5j8_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
| [](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zr34fnblp1pdhjb1b6ecvdtomtmplgp3efioj92o_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
| | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids.
---
[](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zfr7lmj1gkvi5brk0rqbjdg46v4f23nid2rl7720_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs)
---
| | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, [**then I would like to invite you to be a part of our life-changing mission here at BRAVE Books.**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2zkghrnfcufbgpjqvs5b60a36vcpl2mh13tpfvq2g_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs) Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through **BRAVE Books** ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. [**Would you prayerfully consider making a gift to BRAVE Books today?**](http://e.americanactionnews.com/rd/9z2znvf5msrobpllhb9q5c5k2vkr6209idk88qcnrgo_rp22sh2s8i6eor3cljmeor2cth2bs) America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But **BRAVE Books** is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren!
---
| | Sincerely,
---

---
Kirk Cameron

clean_body: Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement. | | | | | Dear Friend,If you agree that it’s time for Christians to boldly and unashamedly lead our schools and our culture back to our country’s founding values......will you help me teach children the true meaning of the rainbow?The Bible tells us that God gave us the rainbow as a symbol of his covenant with the earth: “I have set my rainbow in the clouds, and it will be the sign of the covenant between me and the earth.” Genesis 9:13 Sadly, most Americans – and especially our children – have come to believe that the rainbow is a symbol of the LGBTQ+ movement.After all, it was back in 1999 that Bill Clinton first recognized June as “LGBTQ+ Pride Month.” And LGBTQ+ “rainbow” flags now fly year-round in stores, libraries, schools, and the halls of Congress...and even in some churches. With Christianity under attack in America, our nation desperately needs Christians who are willing to stand up and defend our faith.My name is Kirk Cameron.Maybe you recognize me from the 1980’s family sitcom “Growing Pains” or from my work in inspirational movies like “Fireproof” and “Monumental.”I know firsthand how dangerous it is to be indoctrinated by leftist values. Pride almost took me down as a young actor in Hollywood.But the gospel saved me.I love being an actor, but what’s far more important is being a husband, dad, grandfather, and a Christian.When I saw the anti-God, anti-family, and anti-America messages the Left was pushing on young parents and children, I knew I had a duty to take action. So together with a small Christian book publisher aptly named BRAVE Books , I wrote “As You Grow” to teach children how to grow in wisdom through the fruit of the spirit.But that’s not all they are doing.BRAVE Books is giving parents, grandparents, and teachers the necessary tools to combat the Left’s hijacking of our children’s hearts and minds in schools, libraries, and elsewhere.And now, because of faithful Americans like you, God’s Word is being heard in the public square once again.Friend, I’m used to receiving hate mail from atheists and radical Left-wing activists who don’t like our faith message.But their responses make me realize just how much the LGBTQ+ community has changed our culture in just one generation.In the past, the gay community largely claimed they just wanted “tolerance.”But now that’s not enough.Today, they want everyone to celebrate and approve of their lifestyle – and they’re accusing those who don’t of “hate speech.” But by not standing up for God’s Word, Christians have allowed the Left’s indoctrination to creep into our churches, schools, and into our nation.And now we’re seeing the terrible effects of our inaction: our young children are being corrupted and led astray from the Faith. Think of all the drag queen story hours being held in public libraries, or the soft porn being promoted as teen reading, or even the classrooms where leftist teachers are sharing their “sexual orientation” and pronouns with kids as young as 5-years-old.More and more people are calling good evil...and evil good (Isaiah 5:20). My heart is heavy when I think of what’s in store for this nation if we don’t protect our children from these demonic influences.Never before has our culture so desperately needed parents and teachers to point our children towards the truth and away from the lies of man. | | | That’s exactly why BRAVE Books started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on. | | That’s exactly why BRAVE Books started the “See You at the Library” movement and my children’s TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” -- to boldly, publicly and unashamedly remind Christians and non-believers alike of the truth of God’s Word and the Christian values our country was founded on. | | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids. | | | Our national “See You at the Library” movement has reached tens of thousands of children in thousands of libraries across the country – including the Library of Congress!At each event, we pray together, say the pledge of allegiance, and read books that instill Godly and patriotic values in our kids. | | Just the thing we need to counteract the evil “Drag Queen Story Hours” and every other leftist lie.And with our TV show “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” we are reaching hundreds of thousands of families with timeless Christian values.Giving parents and kids an alternative to the filth being shown on screens today. As you can imagine, secularists despise our mission. They do not want us engaging the culture with biblical truths. And they are doing everything in their power to discredit, shame, and silence us. If you agree that we must introduce thousands of more children to the truth of God’s Word in these troubled times, Will you help us teach children Christian virtues and proclaim truth to a hurting world that needs God’s Word more than ever?So many children simply don’t know the truth about God or His love for them. That’s why I’m hoping you’ll help us reach even more families through BRAVE Books ’ crucial projects, like our Christmas “Mouse in the House,” a Godly alternative to that secular “elf” game that so many families use, or producing the next season of “Iggy and Mr. Kirk” giving children wholesome content that entertains while building their character. America’s public schools are “normalizing” the ungodly agenda of the radical Left by decorating classrooms and hallways with “Gay Pride” rainbows, filling library shelves with LGBTQ+ books, and pushing movies and TV shows that glorify sinful behavior.They’re leading our children away from Christ...and toward an empty, godless and hopeless secular doctrine. But BRAVE Books is giving parents and grandparents a way to fight back and teach the next generation that God’s word is GOOD. Thank you for supporting BRAVE Books – and for helping us protect our precious children and grandchildren! | | Sincerely, Kirk Cameron | | | Brave Books 3528 S Loop 336 E Suite CConroe, TX 77301 | Pop Acta Media | American Action News PO Box 1177 Fort Collins, CO 80522 |

# **['Can we kill him': 6th-grade girl group harassed 12-year-old before making death threats, Ohio family says](http://trk.libertyledger.-w)**
---
An Ohio family says that authorities did little to protect their 12-year-old son after they reported online harassment that included a death threat plot. The messages were allegedly made by other students from Madison Local Schools in Butler County, according to the victim's aunt, Courtney Sorrell.'We didn't want this to blow up, but we want the kids to know you can't make these threats and bully someone or say these things and not be held accountable.'Sorrell said the harassment began after a breakup, which led to the girl group targeting her nephew."Her and her friends were targeting my nephew individually at first," Sorrell

The federal jury in Brooklyn was unable [...]...Click to read more

# **[Elderly bus driver says she was fired for posting 'English-only' sign — now the Trump administration is investigating](http://trk.libertyledger.-JQ4Qq2y1GkGQ)**
---
A Pennsylvania woman says she was forced to get food assistance benefits after being fired from her job as a school bus driver over a "racially insensitive" sign.Diane Crawford, 66, told WHP-TV that she put up the sign because she thought it would help stop bullying on her bus.'I don't know what else to do. I'm on Medicare and Medicaid now and SNAP. ... I had to go on antidepressants because of this.'"Out of respect to English-only students, there will be no speaking Spanish on this bus," the note read.

name: Unite4Freedom
subject: 🎯 12.24.25 Celebrating Your Support with Holiday Cheer
body:
We are deeply grateful
|
---
Dear Peter, We are deeply grateful for your generous support and dedication to our Unite4Freedom mission this year. Your time and contributions made a meaningful impact. name: Tom Fitton
subject: My thanks to you this Christmas
body:
This Christmas, I want to express my deepest gratitude for your generous gifts to Judicial Watch.

| | |
---
|
---
|
---
| Dear Fellow American,

This Christmas, I want to express my deepest gratitude **for you**. As a loyal reader of my messages, you are expanding the reach of Judicial Watch’s work.
Every year, we do our best to put your support to work in court: fighting government corruption, protecting honest elections, and defending the rule of law.
**_For you. For your children. And for your children 's children_**.
And thanks to you, this year was a tremendous success. Now, with a momentous election year ahead, we must double down on our unfaltering commitment to the fight for law and order.
_[So, today I humbly ask that in addition to your consistent monthly gift, you also please make a generous tax-deductible year-end gift to start Judicial Watch out stronger than ever in 2026](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78522&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.
| [ MAKE A YEAR-END GIFT TO DEFEND THE RULE OF LAW ](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78522&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)
---

Thank you. We cannot preserve the rights and freedoms you and I hold dear for future generations without your generous support _._

Merry Christmas,

Tom Fitton

President, Judicial Watch

P.S. In this season of giving, your support for Judicial Watch helps give the American people the transparency and honest elections they deserve. _[Please make your most generous tax-deductible gift now to keep Judicial Watch fully resourced to start 2026](https://myjw.pr.judicialwatch.org/link.php?AGENCY=jw&M=27089954&N=78522&L=30946&F=H&drurl=aHR0cHM6Ly93d3cuanVkaWNpYWx3YXRjaC5vcmcvZG9uYXRlL3RoYW5rLXlvdS0yMTYvP3V0bV9zb3VyY2U9ZGVwbG95ZXImdXRtX21lZGl1bT1lbWFpbCZ1dG1fY29udGVudD1BTWpjd09EazVOVFElM0QmdXRtX2NhbXBhaWduPU1heSZ1dG1fdGVybT1Ob24tRG9ub3Jz&hash=aafc90fdace25a5a1871d30fa9a66413e29290f69056683c8a490d5fbaf2a4d2)_.

name: The Flyover
subject: US Economy Grew, Christmas Eve Storm, and Powerball Jackpot
body:
The U.S. economy [grew at 4.3% in the third quarter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAYhJ8Gd1jwm8W3BcVGkbtLcyeltFjz2ybB4PzgRX77yFHe4KqRZqTRzPfzfXy3Pvi4_LAbmjKnMWLNAUtBGo-MU4ppOxfCOq3kc9lsxheOIODGJXBQo7M-nKNqnJkRAbsGjey1vvVKwVuzGqVm6KRTVt2h09L1ILVW_ZvTd-Fgxsabq00CKClFL_r2aaV8aoHiNs2T0siUQOdLovZX8rGsOIczvZDaKW1NMGspe2bdg8HAYKi1tluOV8ZgwMiPzGDYUsTzUku_sVzOkfn_czwftJPPmHn1ZeWKd3yhVMvKyRbkPvKyenL8z2GpIDEYLPHHQ358fi531g1p8o51379dFLHmD6S9IeP26kPwWfdMiWWzPvzbW74E-WXgbwAAAP__ISuSLA)—the fastest pace in two years—blowing past the 3.3% forecast and fueled by robust consumer spending.

| | |
---
| [](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVss7jVfHhi6eEvXjojgS0yFTQQ0Ud6-cl-h2xmOfsP_6-quPuV03D_9TrbH4g56tUy9U3U_jUI5yv6-V3qFrabWd9_oSQ45ygvgBYVbfcpvJ4bVRiKkaSALWimphUAzbFbePAI3kZSORhKRoomjMAamoGYQQ7KnBogCgGuux5sHuClOXIYYhCImOK2plzp-l3T0jWJ-lyfVMZR9yHbr_dHY9MFwYbj4GMdaGvXuWy8HnSeGS2C4iFlymA3DBZScDEznMrOeh2rXxyvlnJrSTPD77lP-0_u_kjwt_gYAAP___SVyFA) | |
# Wednesday, December 24, 2025
---|---
**Merry Christmas!** On this day in 1826, a drunken Christmas party at the United States Military Academy escalated into [the eggnog riot](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUgOGnwVssOAbbGRiudGV1SddIXRCBg02FTQTHsfz2VfoKnX_pG_77zdxsTHGbP-2KmkI2Gx41IREWs1d0ecvrORc83FJipdVWfKEBDuoi4ALSeBvTaWTjdUAE7BrUYuh7NUgJY7Po0VrPlR3VVQ3e9RItugDXMELPkXveRP3WBIAUgg98aB9WiMc7Khec7JFJjj5SLu13jhstGNKZX1hal9cm6YXoWVn3j8HEYDrzTnv7QAbT1wwfdCdSN8m6KaClvSDr_tfFFvRN0f55xJRi7Qcm-bzamH5J-tOHl4afAAAA___sqnIr), which involved over one-third of the cadets after a large quantity of whiskey had been smuggled into the academy. Tonight, millions of Americans will sit down to Christmas dinner, and it will taste better than an ordinary meal for reasons that go beyond tradition. There's [real science behind it](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkDGypCAURVeDGRbQiCYEk5j1pBNaCE99M8jrAlrK3U_1D_4Gfn7r1jnnz3N5OoyY9t_uBFs3WhK0EqFWyMu7gKdE571naP7IWOrpClywKKEGLhVXegkO473oLtgNQMGjAytHY4ZRazV1h13lINcwDc5AcIMRsPrg1DDCYxqnEEKH9vMmldJSilGM_eqkXI0AMfjNawNMCwhYKfd_CVM9YIs3XZB7T2cX7VHrq7DHL6ZmpubWWl_BH4ki7XeC2ij_K58pU3OCd6biEZIHpmaXK_oIhan5pnfma3aYOBbeMEPglXikC_i3Od-IAj8gQ-HtuLkWkzCyyza8GsaIxYxMi_10GL_Y6o-CXlb9DwAA__8qJY6c), as we report below. Have a great time with your family. Today's edition is shorter than usual as our staff takes time to spend the holiday with theirs. Today's sponsor, [Rosetta Stone](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0L1uwyAUxfGnwVss7jVfHhi6eEvXjojgS0yFTQQ0Ud6-cl-h2xmOfsP_6-quPuV03D_9TrbH4g56tUy9U3U_jUI5yv6-V3qFrabWd9_oSQ45ygvgBYVbfcpvJ4bVRiKkaSALWimphUAzbFbePAI3kZSORhKRoomjMAamoGYQQ7KnBogCgGuux5sHuClOXIYYhCImOK2plzp-l3T0jWJ-lyfVMZR9yHbr_dHY9MFwYbj4GMdaGvXuWy8HnSeGS2C4iFlymA3DBZScDEznMrOeh2rXxyvlnJrSTPD77lP-0_u_kjwt_gYAAP___SVyFA), is making it easier to finally follow through on your New Year's goals by giving you lifetime access to 25 languages for a one-time price--so you can start speaking with confidence in just minutes a day.
|
---
## Economy Roars Past Expectations
The U.S. economy [grew at 4.3% in the third quarter](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkLGO3CAYhJ8Gd1jwm8W3BcVGkbtLcyeltFjz2ybB4PzgRX77yFHe4KqRZqTRzPfzfXy3Pvi4_LAbmjKnMWLNAUtBGo-MU4ppOxfCOq3kc9lsxheOIODGJXBQo7M-nKNqnJkRAbsGjey1vvVKwVuzGqVm6KRTVt2h09L1ILVW_ZvTd-Fgxsabq00CKClFL_r2aaV8aoHiNs2T0siUQOdLovZX8rGsOIczvZDaKW1NMGspe2bdg8HAYKi1tluOV8ZgwMiPzGDYUsTzUku_sVzOkfn_czwftJPPmHn1ZeWKd3yhVMvKyRbkPvKyenL8z2GpIDEYLPHHQ358fi531g1p8o51379dFLHmD6S9IeP26kPwWfdMiWWzPvzbW74E-WXgbwAAAP__ISuSLA)--the fastest pace in two years--blowing past the 3.3% forecast and fueled by robust consumer spending. President Trump celebrated the results, posting on Truth Social that _"TARIFFS are responsible for the GREAT USA Economic Numbers"_ and noting that the reading exceeded most economists' predictions. [See his post here](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu6yAUxvGngS3R4RgDHhiudOUtnSp1tAgcx1RgLCCJ8vZV-gpdv0_6Df-vy3JxMcX99uEy2b6WZadnS9Q71eXeyJe95Net0tNvNbaeXaMHLQg4ngSeUC7BxfRaJA92JUIaOFmhlRq1lGj4Zr2aQnCDMUZeJ7UaFDRN0yjNalDrADzatyYQpRCgQZ-vToirAoLRr14qYhIoxF7q-bvEvW-0pld5UD37knmyW-9HY8M_hjPDudd731rx0aX3_x4lVHLpf9ldCp_1ng-G81FabwxnIUatpgFQGRhBaQO82nA8Y0qxKc0k3LKLvxTvf-rzsPgTAAD__4Uyd7w). [Consumer spending jumped](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0M2u2yAQBeCnwTsiGBM7XbBIVXl3u4mqLi0MY5uWn5TBQXn7yu0j3NVIc6Sjo-_nx_xhfPBp-24i6rrmOWGjgLVimQ9Cm1OO761gs3vxVKMhfOEMAq5cAgc1O-PDe1ad0ysiYN-hluMwXEel4Nbt2ipzk-sN1BfonV364WZGa9fxqpQSq-k7r882CaCkFKMYL4uRchkEiqtdrRqQKYHO11wuv7JPdcc1vPMLy8Xm2AW91_ok1t8ZTAym1tolUjozBhMmfhCDKeaE7_Oa8hvr-Sl5OahymxMdEQunJybn08aXnKkSP4jX3RfH_xymVCz8P4W3fCu51Z3BZAq_3-Xjx96I9VO23rH-29fTEhs9sDy7ot2z-RA8DSNTYovGh3-r66eoXxr-BgAA__98jpan) 3.5%, while exports surged 8.8% and imports fell, though the report is [considerably outdated](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkMFuhCAYhJ8Gbxj4RdkeOPTibXvt0YD8Kg2KhX-X7Ns3Nn2D3iaZZGa--bxPdxtiONYPu6OhJU0H1hKRCPP0KDinI-2vNWOdtxwK7bbgEycQ0HMJHNTkbYivSTXeLIiAXYNG6mHotVJwazajlBN6QeEX3UvtoevkgN2bs-7mncVbE8yVJgGUlEIL3TorpRsEin5eZjUgUwJ9oJTbrxQO2nCJr_TE3M5pb6LZiM7CuncGI4Ox1trOrlwUl89gvCSDcfUnz3imTPyPiq85Vdo4bSF7_v2wmTDzawyDscnGnzXEGMqgmRLrbkP8baR_3fQ08BMAAP__4lR99w) after being delayed by the 43-day government shutdown. ## US Steps Up Venezuela Pressure
The U.S. has surged special-operations aircraft and troop-carrying cargo planes into the Caribbean this week as [President Trump escalates pressure](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykUD3OnDAQPQ10XtmDgU3hIg3dlzYlmrUHmMg_yPZCyOkjVrlBqhk9Pb2_n1_zF7LnuP7AQKYuaY50Fk-1Up7fhWyKKVxrptNumUsNWOigGST0QoEAPTtkf826dWYhAupaMmochn7UGp7tZhyCAqm-dePgFCqwFuXrqfVT0zJKPbRsbjUFoJWSoxwfL1TqNUiSvV2sHqjRkhzXlB-_Ese60eKvdFB-2BRab7Za99J03xuYGpjO83xgDlcmm9bIlVO8eQ1Md7H74HGJf_9t3MD0FkV8YPq9Y3RFBPZcMV_C0e7TFShWEQmzOCjSnzd5FCfXTSyi64vA6ATHSt7zStGSQM4241LbbNx-svdchrHRcg3I_pO6_tfUh4G_AQAA__8Hs5ap) on Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro, according to U.S. officials and flight-tracking data. At least 10 CV-22 Osprey aircraft tied to elite special forces units arrived alongside C-17 transports [carrying personnel and equipment into Puerto Rico](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkM_K2zAQxJ9GvilIG9n-fPAhpfhQ-AollB7NWlonW_THSIpN3r64fYRe5jADw8zv1-f8iew5Pr5joLGuaY50FE-1Up5fhWyKKbwfmQ77zFxqwEI7zaCglRokmNkh-_dsGjeuREDXhkbdd13bGwMfzXP8aA1A2w-waEJFA8HgBqV6QtcOVrcNj2ebBjBaq171lwW1XjpFqrWrNR0Jo8hxTfnyO3GsT1r9O-2ULzaFxo_PWrcirjcBk4DpOI5LKPHMBEwU5asImM5TAqbXP5Eh7VRkzSltRWJ0Ep3jyimil2Ujy-hl2ijj6RWJnG3GtUqONUmLmZeFMAqYMMvbTd9_fvsRxHVKlp24fv1y4qSj3ClvTR7ddrD3XLpeGPUIyP7v8PpftPcR_gQAAP__RbqWkA). The buildup comes as Trump ordered a blockade of Venezuelan oil tankers, declared the country’s airspace effectively closed, and refused to rule out airstrikes or land operations. Defense officials declined to detail the movements, but analysts say the deployments signal forces being positioned for possible direct military action.
## Christmas Eve Storm Threatens SoCal
Southern California--which typically receives just 2.4 inches of rain for the entire month of December--is bracing for an [18-hour deluge today](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0LFu5CAYBOCnwZ0t8xuwt6A46eRurzlFKa3f8GOIsFkBWctvH22KvEDqkUbzzft9uWOI4dj-4U66urQcdJZItVJePguZdKT92jKdxudQ6o6FnrRAD7Ll0IJYLIZ4LaKx2hEBDQ1pPiolRyFgaryGFRxyK5y5KQAkjhPnxq2CFN7E5JqgX20cQHDej_3Yrcj5qnrqpXFGKGKiJxtqyt1HCkf15OKVnpQ7k_Ymal_ro7DhD4OZwYyreQm6Lb1iBvPbfwazTzFYvNqTsHrKrUuZDJbanj5Uan9sDOZSU77YMAfLhr8cJsWllLLJ2j7OEGMoamSi33YM8XtA_dVrTw1fAQAA___xooH8) that could bring up to 9 inches of rain and life-threatening flooding. Road closures began on Monday, with Topanga Canyon Boulevard [shutting down completely](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJykkL2OszAQAJ_GdET24p80Lr6GLl97JTL2Aj4tOPI6Qbz9KfcK149mpPl6TI-QKR_r_7Cjb0uZDjyZsDWs04sxlqPs11rxjFvN3PbA-MYJJJheQQ96SiHTNeku-QURcOjQK2etcVrDvdu8iXKwkIJ2s4xymJMzGGZrBnNfYJb3LvuPTQFopaST7jYHpWYrUZq4RG1RaIkpt1Jv3yUfbcOFrvLGeotl78hvrT1ZDP8EjAJGxlixUeFwrEjIH0jASKGvJaQ-UuFXRe7Tq-Zj7bdCOYWLBYxd9el5ZqLM1gkt1z1k-m20P415e_gJAAD__yAOeXY) and Pacific Coast Highway remaining open, with crews pre-positioned at vulnerable spots. Wind gusts could reach 70 mph, and the region faces debris flows that can be triggered by as little as half an inch of rain per hour on burned slopes. Here's a [look at the flood timeline](https://email.editor.jointheflyover.com/c/eJyk0DuO4zAQBNDTSJkEss2PHTDYRJk33VCgyabUC34MkrbGtx_YwVxg4gKq8Orfdb1aipS3vzah6aGsGY8WsXes66OhK7mk11bxcHul1pNt-MQVGMiJwwRi9ZbiaxWjNwER8DSi4VopqYWA87gbp7lX6iICXIQ6qyAliLPQPgipmNS3kcy7jQMIzplmer5Zzm-KIZMuOKFwEAw99VLn_4Vy3zHEV3linV1JYzR77_c2nP4MsAywHMcxh_IV7TsdYHlzBlhaefQda56cjRRKzWQnb_OGtTza1HqpafoRTh9ep4SRMo7V-PtBMVJTehBsS5biZ7v_6rCnge8AAAD__yB2gXg).

clean_body: The U.S. economy —the fastest pace in two years—blowing past the 3.3% forecast and fueled by robust consumer spending. | | | | | | Wednesday, December 24, 2025 ---|--- Merry Christmas! On this day in 1826, a drunken Christmas party at the United States Military Academy escalated into , which involved over one-third of the cadets after a large quantity of whiskey had been smuggled into the academy. Tonight, millions of Americans will sit down to Christmas dinner, and it will taste better than an ordinary meal for reasons that go beyond tradition. There's , as we report below. Have a great time with your family. Today's edition is shorter than usual as our staff takes time to spend the holiday with theirs. Today's sponsor, , is making it easier to finally follow through on your New Year's goals by giving you lifetime access to 25 languages for a one-time price--so you can start speaking with confidence in just minutes a day. | Economy Roars Past Expectations The U.S. economy fastest pace in two years--blowing past the 3.3% forecast and fueled by robust consumer spending. President Trump celebrated the results, posting on Truth Social that "TARIFFS are responsible for the GREAT USA Economic Numbers" and noting that the reading exceeded most economists' predictions. . 3.5%, while exports surged 8.8% and imports fell, though the report is after being delayed by the 43-day government shutdown. The report likely reduces chances of another Federal Reserve rate cut in January, with inflation accelerating to 2.9% in the quarter. US Steps Up Venezuela Pressure The U.S. has surged special-operations aircraft and troop-carrying cargo planes into the Caribbean this week as on Venezuelan leader Nicolás Maduro, according to U.S. officials and flight-tracking data. At least 10 CV-22 Osprey aircraft tied to elite special forces units arrived alongside C-17 transports . The buildup comes as Trump ordered a blockade of Venezuelan oil tankers, declared the country’s airspace effectively closed, and refused to rule out airstrikes or land operations. Defense officials declined to detail the movements, but analysts say the deployments signal forces being positioned for possible direct military action. Christmas Eve Storm Threatens SoCal Southern California--which typically receives just 2.4 inches of rain for the entire month of December--is bracing for an that could bring up to 9 inches of rain and life-threatening flooding. The storm threatens mudslides near recent wildfire burn scars, with issued for the Palisades, Sunset, and Hurst burn areas through 11 p.m. Thursday. Road closures began on Monday, with Topanga Canyon Boulevard and Pacific Coast Highway remaining open, with crews pre-positioned at vulnerable spots. Wind gusts could reach 70 mph, and the region faces debris flows that can be triggered by as little as half an inch of rain per hour on burned slopes. Here's a . name: The Angry Democrat: Matt Diemer
subject: Angry Democrat Isn’t a Brand. It’s a Reckoning.
body:
How far we've drifted from real conversations and policy

| |
---|---|---
| | | Forwarded this email? [Subscribe here](https://substack..pnaQ-12UsISdVt8yMuGdmvz2WGwJkTj-2vNFB-Oo8bI?) for more

---
We need to find other **ANGRY DEMOCRATS.** Please consider sharing and subscribing to fuel the ANGER for change.
* * *
# [Angry Democrat Isn't a Brand. It's a Reckoning.](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182456175&utm_source=post-email-title&utm_campaign=email-post-title&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNDU2MTc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY1NzQ4MDgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTE2NjgwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IzdvqLxAyxR7QEOAP_-JkrPX0CWz7Zuvzos2vKRehow)
### How far we've drifted from real conversations and policy
| | [The Angry Democrat](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---
| Dec 24
---
| [](https://substack.com/@theangrydem)
---

---
| | | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182456175&utm_source=substack&isFreemail=true&submitLike=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNDU2MTc1LCJyZWFjdGlvbiI6IuKdpCIsImlhdCI6MTc2NjU3NDgwOCwiZXhwIjoxNzY5MTY2ODA4LCJpc3MiOiJwdWItMzE1OTI1OCIsInN1YiI6InJlYWN0aW9uIn0.Mi6rAlCJZWxOlY19Zkuci1NsRfjQr9tg5xGum3b7H3Y&utm_medium=email&utm_campaign=email-reaction&r=1hvr60)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182456175&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&isFreemail=true&comments=true&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNDU2MTc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY1NzQ4MDgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTE2NjgwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IzdvqLxAyxR7QEOAP_-JkrPX0CWz7Zuvzos2vKRehow&r=1hvr60&utm_campaign=email-half-magic-comments&action=post-comment&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=3159258&post_id=182456175&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNDU2MTc1LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY1NzQ4MDgsImV4cCI6MTc2OTE2NjgwOCwiaXNzIjoicHViLTMxNTkyNTgiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.IzdvqLxAyxR7QEOAP_-JkrPX0CWz7Zuvzos2vKRehow)
---
| | [](https://substack..j6xGAetr-m_ofBgT4hsMdZhsJixHvrTbuzgxWT-djuk?&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email)
---
| | [READ IN APP](https://open.substack.com/pub/mattdiemer/p/angry-democrat-isnt-a-brand-its-a?utm_source=email&redirect=app-store&utm_campaign=email-read-in-app)
---

First, Merry Christmas to everyone.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/4b0ce45f-6d6b-44b3-bb83-5e9f2fb80201?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Today's post is not about breaking news, philosophy, or reacting to the outrage of the week. This is about why _The Angry Democrat_ exists, what I mean when I say that, and what I am trying to do here.
I owe you that clarity.
### Why I'm a Democrat
I did not grow up in a Democratic household.
My family were/are Republicans. Not vague, country club Republicans. Rush Limbaugh Republicans. Glenn Beck Republicans. Conservative Christian Republican messaging was everywhere in my life. I listened to Rush Limbaugh in the car on the way to church every Saturday morning. Yes, Saturday morning. That is a story for another time.
Despite that environment, I gravitated toward what the Democratic Party used to represent. Working class politics. Blue collar dignity. Unions. Fiscal responsibility paired with social responsibility. What I believed were core American values.
Bill Clinton. Barack Obama. John F. Kennedy.
Then I left the country.
I lived abroad for a long time. When you do that, you consume American politics at a distance. Through news, headlines, and filtered narratives. You miss the slow shifts. The internal realignments. The cultural capture.
When I came back and decided to run for Congress, I thought I was stepping into the same Democratic Party I remembered.
### Loyalty Tests Over Solutions
I came back roughly fifteen to twenty years removed from living in the United States and assumed I could slide back in without much friction. Instead, I walked straight into a party that felt unfamiliar, insular, and rigid.
What I learned very quickly was how party politics actually works.
It is not about ideas. It is not about outcomes. It is about structures, gatekeeping, loyalty tests, and staying inside the walled garden. Independent thinking is tolerated until it becomes inconvenient. Then you are sidelined.
This is not unique to Democrats. It is endemic to party politics.
If you step outside the approved talking points, if you try to pull ideas from across the ideological spectrum and ask what actually works, you are treated as a problem. Towing the line matters more than solving the problem.
I ran for Congress as a Democrat because I believed that still made the most sense for what I cared about. But it did not take long to realize that the Democratic agenda, as practiced, did not leave room for honest exploration of policy.
That realization did not make me apathetic. It made me angry.
### Why the Anger Is Earned
I am angry that good policy does not get enacted even when it is popular.
I am angry that corruption, insider trading, nepotism, and money dominate the conversation while working people are told to wait their turn.
I am angry that universal, material policies have been displaced by performative politics that fracture coalitions instead of building them.
I am angry that Democrats lost focus, took their base for granted, and handed working class rhetoric to Republicans by default.
And now we are watching the same thing happen on the other side.
The Republican Party is fracturing over broken promises. Epstein files. Endless wars that were supposed to end. Confusion over what "America First" even means anymore.
MAGA voters are asking a fair question. What side are we on?
Please consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aaIRCObDYEIOQsB8Vd4k3QZibkIMxsGNMtH9-Pw99FQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=182456175)
### Showing Up Is the Baseline
There is another reason this project exists.
You have to face fears to say something publicly. To risk failure, embarrassment, ridicule, and criticism. I am not pretending that makes me special to try to face them. It is simply true.
But it is only the first step.
What matters is the follow through. Relentlessness. The willingness to absorb consequences and keep going anyway. The first 80% of effort is easier than the final 20%. That final twenty percent of effort is where change actually happens, and it is the hardest part.
Doing something halfway gets you halfway results. Pushing all the way is exhausting, uncomfortable, and rarely rewarded immediately.
That is the work.
### Why This Newsletter Exists
This newsletter exists because I want to engage honestly.
Not as a partisan attack dog. Not as a grifter chasing rage clicks. Not as an armchair quarterback screaming from a distance.
I am deeply frustrated by social media justice warriors who sit comfortably, troll endlessly, and never show up. They do not vote. They do not donate. They do not run. They do not organize. They do not risk anything.
I do not want to be that guy.
I do not want to be the person who complains about the weather and shakes his fist at the clouds while doing nothing.
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/7c9024b9-8278-47f0-a69a-4869816787af?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
I want to be part of the conversation. I want to shape it where I can. I want to be able to look back and say I tried. That I did not stay silent because silence was easier.
So far in my life, I do not carry many regrets. I have not let fear, doubt, comfort, or insecurity stop me from doing the things I wanted to do.
Politics is one of the hardest conversations to engage in honestly. That is precisely why I refuse to look back someday and say I should have said something.
### What I Actually Want This to Become
I am not pretending I have this fully mapped out.
Right now, my goal is conversation that leads somewhere. Not content optimized purely for the attention economy. Not rage bait that leaves me feeling dirty after I hit publish.
Yes, I understand how the algorithm works. Yes, I know what drives engagement. [I literally write about it.](https://substack.com/redirect/a8af2a6a-32a5-4335-9fad-312381e2574e?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)
But if growth requires abandoning nuance, solutions, and intellectual honesty, then the growth is hollow.
Maybe this fails. Maybe it never gets big. Maybe people decide they do not care.
That is a risk I am willing to take.
What I want is a space that is safe for ideas. Republican ideas. Democratic ideas. Progressive ideas. Conservative ideas. Centrist ideas. Ideas that do not yet have labels.
I want a place that calls out bullshit regardless of who is saying it. A place that focuses on kitchen table issues. Housing. Healthcare. Wages. Education. Debt. National security. Civil liberties. Endless wars. Fiscal responsibility.
**Policy that affects real lives.**
### About Support and Sustainability
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e312562e-445f-4103-b276-9757e1756afa?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Good work requires resources. The best research, the best reach, the best production all come from being properly funded. That is just reality.
If even a fraction of readers supported this with a small monthly contribution, I could bring in researchers and collaborators and make this something far more impactful.
I have built podcasts. I have built newsletters. I have run for office twice. I know how to do this responsibly.
Any support goes toward making this better, deeper, and more useful.
Please consider becoming a paid subscriber.
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aaIRCObDYEIOQsB8Vd4k3QZibkIMxsGNMtH9-Pw99FQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget-preamble&utm_content=182456175)
### Stay Angry!
I am angry because I still care.
Anger, when directed properly, is not destructive. It is clarifying.
I still believe we the people can influence outcomes. I still believe conversations matter. I still believe better policy is possible.
That belief is why this exists.
Thank you for reading. Thank you for engaging. Thank you for staying angry.
Because underneath the anger, there is still hope.
_Join other**ANGRY DEMOCRATS** by support Matt's work. Subscribe and Share! _
[Upgrade to paid](https://substack..aaIRCObDYEIOQsB8Vd4k3QZibkIMxsGNMtH9-Pw99FQ?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=182456175)

body:
| | | This is a BIG deal.
---
