|
---
Peter—

The Trump administration quietly announced earlier this week that it is no longer providing abortion care or counseling for veterans relying on VA health care—even in instances of rape, incest, or to save the health of the pregnant person. **They thought we wouldn’t notice, but we’ve had our eye on them since Day 1.**

[Giving up is not an option. With attacks on reproductive freedom accelerating, your support before the end of 2025 is crucial.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121898634/590953750/1141910609?sourceid=1151060&utm_campaign=26emjge-1222aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=vaban&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAzNGMwZC1kNWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnAYNSSvf4LsUkLrVELXND-Q2hhkz04YEalc_YZtJNo=&emci=0fd32c9d-40e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=74034c0d-d5e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237) | [MATCH YOUR GIFT 5X](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121898635/590953751/1141910609?sourceid=1151060&utm_campaign=26emjge-1222aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=vaban&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAzNGMwZC1kNWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnAYNSSvf4LsUkLrVELXND-Q2hhkz04YEalc_YZtJNo=&emci=0fd32c9d-40e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=74034c0d-d5e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

This policy is effectively a national abortion ban for the more than 9 million veterans and their beneficiaries who can no longer access abortion care at VA health care facilities, _including in the 14 states that protect abortion rights._

For veterans living in the 13 states that already ban abortion, this policy will shut off what may have been their only path to urgently needed care.

Veterans risked their lives to defend our safety and freedom—and now the Trump administration is taking theirs away. [We will not stop fighting until all people, no matter where they live, have access to reproductive freedom. Join the fight and your gift will be matched 5X.](https://click.everyaction.com/k/121898636/590953752/1141910609?sourceid=1151060&utm_campaign=26emjge-1222aax-on&utm_medium=ea&utm_source=email&utm_content=vaban&amtOpts=&recurringAmtOpts=&am=&recurringAm=&is_optimized_ask=true&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9DRlJSL0NGUlIvMS85NTk4MiIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICI3NDAzNGMwZC1kNWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=qnAYNSSvf4LsUkLrVELXND-Q2hhkz04YEalc_YZtJNo=&emci=0fd32c9d-40e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&emdi=74034c0d-d5e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=954237)

Nancy Northup

name: Haley Stevens
subject: five reasons to give five bucks
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Haley Stevens for Senate
body:
help us close the gap

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. [To unsubscribe from this email list, please click here.](https://act.haleyformi.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?&t=1&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
| | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10710?t=2&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
Hi null, it’s Haley with a quick morning update.

**Yesterday – after I reached out to this grassroots team – you stepped up in a huge way.** And I’m so, so grateful.
But we still need to raise another $8,300 before midnight tonight. **[So here are five quick reasons to chip in $5 right now:](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10711?t=3&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)**
**1\. We have to stop the chaos.** Between the longest shutdown in U.S. history, cuts to SNAP, and surging health care costs – working families are ready for strong, stable leadership.
**2\. Trump’s tariffs are hitting Michigan hard.** They’re hurting the manufacturing industry I’ve spent my career fighting to protect. And we need more public servants speaking up.
**3.****The GOP megadonors are circling.** Outside spending groups and billionaires are zeroing in on Michigan, trying to buy this seat for Republican Mike Rogers.
**4.****We can win.** Polls show I’m the strongest Democrat running – I’m consistently leading in the primary and polling the best against Mike Rogers in the general.
**5.****The affordability crisis is crushing hardworking Americans.** It's no secret that folks are struggling.**** I'm running for Senate to do what I’ve always done: fight for working families. But I can’t do it alone.
Null, this goal is critical. If we fall short, we risk falling behind just as national Republicans ramp up their attacks.
**[Will you rush $5 before midnight to help us close the gap and keep Michigan blue?](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10711?t=4&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)**
_Please use the links in this email to start a monthly donation through ActBlue._ | | | [Donate $5](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10712?t=5&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
| | [Donate $25](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10713?t=6&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
| | [Donate $50](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10714?t=7&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
| | [Donate Another Amount](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10715?t=8&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
With grit,

Haley
|
* * *
**A note from Haley Stevens:** null, I’m proud to be a lifelong Michigander and the daughter of small-business owners. That’s why I’ve fought so hard for working families my entire life. Now, I’m running for Michigan’s open Senate seat to continue fighting for the people and communities I love. The path to the Senate majority runs right through Michigan, which means this race is shaping up to be the most competitive and expensive in the entire country. The GOP is already coming after me as a top target for defeat, so I’m counting on your grassroots support to fight back and win. [**If you’re in this fight with me, will you add your name to endorse my campaign?**](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10822?email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&t=9&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3) | | | [](https://act.haleyformi.com/go/10717?t=10&akid=1703%2E49239%2EmlDch3)
---
You can also text “JOIN” to 80242 to become a core member of our team and receive exclusive, real-time updates from my campaign.
Thank you,
Haley
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com.

33717 Woodward Ave #539
Birmingham, MI 48009

It’s just us fueling this movement.

name: Ro Khanna
subject: Become a founding member of the No PAC Club
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Ro for Congress
body:
https://rokhanna.com [https://rokhanna.com]
Peter,
Since the Supreme Court’s Citizens United decision, billionaires and big corporations have spent over $1.5 billion trying to buy our democracy.
But here’s the truth: our democracy is not for sale.
That’s why I never have – and never will – take a dime from PACs or lobbyists. And that’s why I co-founded the No PAC Caucus in Congress: to build a government that answers to people, not special interests.
Now I’m asking you to help send a message to Washington loud and clear: Join the No PAC Club today by donating just $1. [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-pac-club?refcode=20251224-ts&amount=1]
https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-pac-club?refcode=20251224-ts&amount=1 [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-pac-club?refcode=20251224-ts&amount=1]
This isn’t about the amount. It’s about sending a powerful message to Washington that millions of people are willing to put their money where their mouth is and demand a government that belongs to the people, not the highest bidder.
👉 Chip in $1 to join the No PAC Club [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/no-pac-club?refcode=20251224-ts&amount=1]
Thank you for your activism and all that you do.
In solidarity,
Ro
Wait! One more thing–
Ro doesn't accept a cent from lobbyists or PACs, meaning our work is completely funded by grassroots supporters like you. By donating just $3 today, you’re helping us create a country that works for everyone, not just those at the top. That means a renewed investment in American manufacturing, Medicare for All, student debt relief, and a green future.
If you want to support our people-powered campaign as we continue to fight for progress in Washington, please consider making a donation of $3 or more today. Thank you!

| | Dorian Gray glanced at the picture, and suddenly an uncontrollable feeling of hatred for Basil Hallward came over him, as though it had been suggested to him by the image on the canvas, whispered into his ear by those grinning lips. The mad passions of a hunted animal stirred within him, and he loathed the man who was seated at the table, more than in his whole life he had ever loathed anything. He glanced wildly around. Something glimmered on the top of the painted chest that faced him. His eye fell on it. He knew what it was. It was a knife that he had brought up, some days before, to cut a piece of cord, and had forgotten to take away with him. He moved slowly towards it, passing Hallward as he did so. As soon as he got behind him, he seized it and turned round. Hallward stirred in his chair as if he was going to rise. He rushed at him and dug the knife into the great vein that is behind the ear, crushing the man’s head down on the table and stabbing again and again. There was a stifled groan and the horrible sound of some one choking with blood. Three times the outstretched arms shot up convulsively, waving grotesque, stiff-fingered hands in the air. He stabbed him twice more, but the man did not move. Something began to trickle on the floor. He waited for a moment, still pressing the head down. Then he threw the knife on the table, and listened. He could hear nothing, but the drip, drip on the threadbare carpet. He opened the door and went out on the landing. The house was absolutely quiet. No one was about. For a few seconds he stood bending over the balustrade and peering down into the black seething well of darkness. Then he took out the key and returned to the room, locking himself in as he did so. The thing was still seated in the chair, straining over the table with bowed head, and humped back, and long fantastic arms. Had it not been for the red jagged tear in the neck and the clotted black pool that was slowly widening on the table, one would have said that the man was simply asleep. How quickly it had all been done! He felt strangely calm, and walking over to the window, opened it and stepped out on the balcony. The wind had blown the fog away, and the sky was like a monstrous peacock’s tail, starred with myriads of golden eyes. He looked down and saw the policeman going his rounds and flashing the long beam of his lantern on the doors of the silent houses. The crimson spot of a prowling hansom gleamed at the corner and then vanished. A woman in a fluttering shawl was creeping slowly by the railings, staggering as she went. Now and then she stopped and peered back. Once, she began to sing in a hoarse voice. The policeman strolled over and said something to her. She stumbled away, laughing. A bitter blast swept across the square. The gas-lamps flickered and became blue, and the leafless trees shook their black iron branches to and fro. He shivered and went back, closing the window behind him.
---

[ ](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c5de64fdeacc4cca9ff545908eadacf9&_e=GonYeZw-GoyG_ieUC6jhvvfovnUeohLjHyUk8mrqaQVIfcI8OwP7YJNUEmYrPriJTGz1G7g74QU6Y2D7UysV4wVWLEKRox5rOgk702fvnNn9Fa4iUaCxB4_Fpe-8_qIVYaZ2suFP4_j1NH8gsNxEQVwrDkOcUw211Y69HfZC-lO5cXDCiBMfkA5YobQaqlFhCc1WuzK6A_bvNezFpl65_jYiy_nSZpK5ADVj0rU_V6hVVeu4l2ghU81aI3HrNPJ2fMuw3-JfsBlopRo1fOK86wLZx9LArAwiG5bbRptYy_qgR9CJ8p408G98CBe_hFdT3IrxHVxDvOM6DPwgAO6I9fhLg-xiUC3yIMDTUmlwsfDXZRSBu5s7XRe5mCuTtu4YovDHqbNpsIRBuQjsVn5jDcJyump308t123Smv-YNg-pCWAgqal5A1HOZCw3musgnYWxUESYRecanYluodzr5DXgfb_C130M5Acg_2GlyYKnsfWt0KAO6Fpj8lx2VUNzSf4G3GG9KfprvXrJgry_5ZVhiCUOm6unBquSnHn2lemVrnOPzSlttj5DiegHfRYJjq3dDvf3Exn3Rihm43utbKA%3D%3D)

* COVID lab origins
* Microplastics in our bodies
* FDA corruption

And now his new warning is the **most terrifying truth** Americans need to hear in 2025.

Millions are in the crosshairs...
If you were born before **January 1, 1965** , this threat affects you first.

[Get the facts yourself and learn why RFK Jr is sounding the alarm about a new emerging health crisis before it’s too late.](https://links.main.yourcapitalminds.com/u/click?_t=affa6bfca09a497f86454ba803e6a9a2&_m=c5de64fdeacc4cca9ff545908eadacf9&_e=GonYeZw-GoyG_ieUC6jhvvfovnUeohLjHyUk8mrqaQVIfcI8OwP7YJNUEmYrPriJTGz1G7g74QU6Y2D7UysV4wVWLEKRox5rOgk702fvnNn9Fa4iUaCxB4_Fpe-8_qIVYaZ2suFP4_j1NH8gsNxEQVwrDkOcUw211Y69HfZC-lO5cXDCiBMfkA5YobQaqlFhC3FFj6Zihgvwtx8lYKjBPJoylppv_oMTu92zz-Da3KFPVhg2vEgNQo6h55oCDEWYEhB859h8NlxCKuHd8isQEw5YGJTvv0nO32KdulvObIYOAXYSUgjneVDvbNkncnPdULGJNA8fV5ML9rssyxCIsM8fFx5t1k-2uvIoGkY6niuYT8TkuzSi_U5TS0rgUV9yXr4MJxwbiDwiPLdLaNhWROGgxacSCOV_5aa9x53owdV39Yj9H43AeEXwFc1wWQOoiN2HslTFQAod1lJzrbU3GoN9s-XOjo0cr_j4yOPuyqI6sXgKiORmFW7MixZO8y9Sft5ZtdQ0XJrn_h5ebBi2LipoSzO7dnrc5d46Emh7hNqpUQ742qBZw_J_zL1E-emqsBALp1F_bjtM1lkHsArF2g%3D%3D)
Ivan Dmytrovych Sirko was born in the early seventeenth century, approximately between 1605 and 1610. This is evidenced primarily by the results of research on Sirko's remains, according to which the Cossack ataman was 70-75 years old at the time of his death in 1680. The first researcher of Sirko's biography, the famous Ukrainian historian Dmytro Yavornytskyi, suggested that the future ataman was born in Sloboda Ukraine in the settlement of Merefa (now the city of Merefa, Kharkiv region). However, this is not true. Merefa was founded only in 1658, i.e. when Sirko was in his late teens. However, Sirko and his family lived in Merefa for a long time in his house, and after his death, his wife and some family members lived there. The fact that Merefa in Slobozhanshchyna is associated with the name of the Cossack Ataman is evidenced by another name for the town recorded in some Ukrainian chronicles, Sirkivka. Where, then, should we look for Sirko's homeland? In our opinion, the sources give grounds to localize it in Eastern Podillia, namely in the Vinnytsia region. It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675*, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671.

It is worth recalling that Sirko was a colonel in Vinnytsia (Kalnytsia) in 1658-1660. As you know, at that time in Ukraine, people who came from the local area were usually elected to such positions. Let us also recall a letter from Hetman of the Left Bank Ukraine Ivan Samoilovych to the tsarist voivode Prince G. Romodanovsky of April 20, 1675, which recounts (in Russian) Sirko's own words: "And since I was born among the Poles, I want to die there." Thus, it is clear that Sirko was born on the Ukrainian lands that were under the rule of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, not Muscovy (the latter included Slobozhanshchyna). The historian Volodymyr Borysenko's assumption that Sirko's birthplace was the hundred-man town of the Bratslav regiment Murafa, a few kilometers from Kalnyk, is correct. Now it is the village of Zhdanov, Vinnytsia region. By the way, Murafa in the Slobozhanshchyna probably originated from this Murafa, because immigrants from the Right Bank of Ukraine to the Left Bank often gave the newly founded settlements the names of their native villages or towns. It is also worth noting Sirko's great interest in Keleberda, which he founded in 1675 on the left bank of the Dnipro. For a long time, he sought from the Moscow tsar the right to own this town or sloboda, as well as the strategically important crossing of the Dnipro near Perevolochna (Sirko wanted this crossing not for himself, but for the entire Zaporozhian Lowland Army). Contrary to popular belief, we believe that Sirko did not come from a Cossack family, but from a small Ukrainian Orthodox gentry. For example, we know the name of a Podillia nobleman, Voytekh Sirko, who was married to a certain Olena Kozynska. Sources mention them in 1592. It is possible that they were relatives of the Cossack leader. Perhaps it is no coincidence that the kings of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, writing to Sirko, called him "urodzon." The word "nobleman" evokes negative associations for many people due to stereotypes instilled in school textbooks of the Stalinist era. However, this approach is not always correct. The term "nobleman" is identical to the words "knight," "chevalier," "nobleman," etc. and was commonly used not only in Poland but also in Ukraine, Belarus, and the Czech Republic. If scholars in Russia, Poland, and the Czech Republic, having contracted vulgar sociologism, no longer accuse Pushkin or Bunin, Suvorov or Kutuzov, Žižka or Kostiushko of being of noble or gentry origin, why have attacks on the Ukrainian and Belarusian gentry continued until recently? Is it not because in this way the imperial "divide and conquer" was transferred to our long-suffering history? Was it not because it was necessary to impose a nihilistic attitude toward the history of Ukraine, to "prove" that Ukrainians or Belarusians were just dark labor without national consciousness, ethnographic material doomed to build other people's empires? Meanwhile, the Ukrainian gentry produced many outstanding sons of Ukraine, fighters for its freedom. Suffice it to mention the names of Kryshtof Kosinski, Petro Konashevych-Sahaidachny, Ivan Sulyma, Ivan Mazepa, Bohdan Khmelnytsky, and his associates: Ivan and Danylo Vyhovsky, Ivan Bohun, Danylo and Ivan Nechai, Mykhailo Krychevsky, Jan Sokolovsky, Siluyan Muzhylovsky, and others. Sirko's appearance and personality do not always coincide with the conventional ideas about him that have developed in some works of art. The Cossack leader was slightly taller than average (174-176 cm), had regular facial features, and a straight nose. By the way, the great Relin intuitively caught this when he depicted him in the center of his painting "Cossacks Writing a Letter to the Turkish Sultan." It is interesting that the prototype for Sirko's image in the painting was the famous military leader General Dragomirov. Only one significant detail was not known to Repin and his consultant D. Yavornytskyi - a red birthmark on Sirko's lower lip on the right side. His contemporaries considered it a "sign of God" given to distinguish him from ordinary people. The Grand Hetman of the Crown, the future King of the Polish-Lithuanian Commonwealth, Jan Sobieski, who knew Sirko well and met him in Bratslav in 1671. | | You are receiving this newsletter from Your Capital Minds (YCM), an esteemed member of the Stark Media LLC family. name: Maggie Hassan
subject: Deeply grateful for you
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Maggie for NH
body:
As this year draws to a close, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and yours the happiest of holidays.

Today, I'm treasuring time with Tom, Ben, Meg, Michael, and our dog Chip — slowing down and simply enjoying being together. These are the moments that truly matter, the ones that remind us why we work so hard for the things we believe in. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121900554/590959090/1734447991?amount=5&refcode=LOC_EM_NOFR_2025.12.24_Holiday-Card_B1_F1_S1_C1_90OP_N-T0&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODg1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIxN2I4YWU5Mi1kN2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=3n2LDtenViBcxQiIecglu_wQINc-F0iQqUflmkBH354=) The holidays remind us of the importance of community, compassion, and connection. As I reflect on this past year and think about what lies ahead, I'm deeply grateful to have you as part of my community.

**However you're celebrating this season — whether with family, friends, or in quiet reflection — I hope it brings you peace and joy.**

Wish every good wish,

Maggie Hassan

name: Elizabeth Warren
subject: It’s a Wonderful Life
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Warren for Senate
body:
Wishing you and yours a peaceful holiday season.

| | | [ ](https://act.elizabethwarren.com/go/216?t=3&akid=2736%2E4032634%2E2V_xOd)
---
|
---

Happy holidays.
I want to share how grateful I am to have you on this team — and also share a movie recommendation if you’re open to it.
Bruce and I named our dog Bailey after George Bailey in It’s A Wonderful Life. We had hoped that our Bailey would be as kind and loyal as the fictional George Bailey — and that he would also stand up to Big Bank executives.
This time of year, thinking about George Bailey’s big-hearted grit, I think about all the Americans who dig deep every day to take care of the people they love and strengthen our communities. Everyone who’s taking time this holiday season to volunteer at a food bank. Everyone who makes it a mission to get to know their neighbors and look out for them. Everyone who’s squaring their shoulders, clearing their throats, and speaking out against the Mr. Potters of the world.
That’s what this team is all about.
Bruce, Bailey, and I are wishing you and your loved ones a happy, healthy, **wonderful** holiday.
Thank you for all that you do. And thanks, as always, for being a part of this.

name: Citizens Alliance New Hampshire
subject: 🎄 Merry Christmas, New Hampshire!
disclaimer_text: PAID FOR BY CITIZENS ALLIANCE OF NEW HAMPSHIRE]()
body:
May God continue to bless New Hampshire’s families with health, freedom, and His unending grace...

| | | | | [|
---](https://citizensalliancenh.us5.list-manage.com/track/click?u=9ec7dd6f72fe3fc1550cd2695&id=6dbd2d14e1&e=8c8e704ee6)
| | | | | | Peter,

**As we approach the end of another busy year, we want to take a moment to wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas.**

This is the time to step back, recharge your batteries, and prepare for the important battles ahead in 2026.

Spend these days with friends and loved ones, make some great new memories, enjoy good food (probably a little too much), and always remember the true reason for the season.

The battles we fight to protect New Hampshire’s values, families, and freedoms never truly stop, but this Christmas season reminds us why we fight so hard in the first place.

**May God continue to bless New Hampshire’s families with health, freedom, and His unending grace.**

Thank you for standing with us throughout the year. Your support makes everything we do possible.

From our family to yours, have a very Merry Christmas!
---
[|

72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet.
This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities. So when Donald Trump’s nominees call Social Security a “Ponzi scheme” and make false claims of fraud and abuse, it’s up to the American people to make their voices heard.

clean_body: It’s up to the American people to make their voices heard. | Do you support increasing Social Security benefits? | | | | 72 million Americans rely on Social Security to make ends meet. This includes seniors, veterans and people with disabilities. So when Donald Trump’s nominees call Social Security a “Ponzi scheme” and make false claims of fraud and abuse, it’s up to the American people to make their voices heard. That’s exactly why Democrats are fighting to expand Social Security — by increasing annual benefits by $2,400 and ensuring it’s funded through 2096! | | | | Your input matters, Team Gillibrand Opinion Polling * A message from DSCC Chair Kirsten Gillibrand: =

body:
| | |
---
| | **Merry Christmas** _From The McDowells_
---
_“For to us a child is born, to us a son is given,_
_And the government will be on his shoulders._
_And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God,_
_Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.”_
_—Isaiah 9:6_
---
Friend, In the McDowell household, we celebrate Christmas all month long. It’s the time of year when we remember Jesus coming to dwell among us. Christmas invites us to reflect on the birth of our Savior and to share love with all those around us. This Christmas, I hope you’ll step away from the news cycle and enjoy meaningful time with friends and family. I also hope you’ll join the McDowell family in celebrating the true reason for the season—our Savior coming in the flesh on a rescue mission to save us. From our family to yours, **_Merry Christmas and Happy New Year!_** _God bless,__Addison and Rachel McDowell_
---

clean_body: | | | | | Merry Christmas From The McDowells “For to us a child is born, to us a son is given, And the government will be on his shoulders. And he will be called Wonderful Counselor, Mighty God, Everlasting Father, Prince of Peace.” —Isaiah 9:6 Friend, In the McDowell household, we celebrate Christmas all month long. It’s the time of year when we remember Jesus coming to dwell among us. Christmas invites us to reflect on the birth of our Savior and to share love with all those around us. This Christmas, I hope you’ll step away from the news cycle and enjoy meaningful time with friends and family. I also hope you’ll join the McDowell family in celebrating the true reason for the season—our Savior coming in the flesh on a rescue mission to save us. From our family to yours, Merry Christmas and Happy New Year! God bless,Addison and Rachel McDowell | | Paid for by McDowell for Congress Copyright(C) 2025 McDowell for Congress Our mailing address is: McDowell for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Be sure to follow the campaign on , , and .

subject: Warm holiday wishes from my family to yours!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by United for Virginia's Future PAC United for Virginia's Future PAC
body:
I hope this season brings you peace and joy.

| [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121903853/590971097/943692417?refcode=BLU_EM_UFVF_2025-12-24_1&amount=25&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjQvMS8xMDM4NTgiLA0KICAiRGlzdHJpYnV0aW9uVW5pcXVlSWQiOiAiMWRiZjAzNWItZGJlMC1mMDExLTgxOTUtMDAwZDNhMWQ1OGFhIiwNCiAgIkVtYWlsQWRkcmVzcyI6ICJkcHdpbGxpczY3QGdtYWlsLmNvbSINCn0%3D&hmac=Dcd99IVjv4huDAaE2_wMHsBo8mHXKtfIm3Rpu1xSzOw=)

| Peter,

As we close out the year, I wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Merry Christmas and a happy holiday season.

This time of year always reminds me of what matters most. Whether you’re traveling to see relatives, celebrating traditions, or just enjoying a quieter moment at home, I hope this season brings you peace and joy.

I’m grateful for the chance to spend time with my husband, Adam, and our three daughters, and I’m deeply grateful for you. Your support, your kindness, and your belief in our shared future mean more than I can say.

I wish you the happiest of holidays!

Abigail Spanberger

name: Seth Moulton
subject: Trump ordered illegal strikes
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to:
body:
They can contradict themselves all they want. The facts don't change.

| |
---
Friend,

Last week, I reviewed classified video of U.S. military strikes ordered by the Trump administration off the coast of Venezuela and questioned the Navy admiral responsible for carrying them out. What I saw was deeply disturbing. [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121904634/590972270/2047415619?refcode=251224_sm_strikes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTRlNThlMS1kY2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oN5TYx5aFbADy2YJqm9ms7qFCtR9UhBSH1TML7CIqoA=&emci=317fc334-80df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=b94e58e1-dce0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769) The administration cannot legally justify these strikes. Not under the Constitution. Not under basic common sense. And not under the standards our military is supposed to follow. In the video, the people targeted were not an imminent threat. They were not helpless, and they were not actively continuing a mission that would justify lethal force. **That matters because without those conditions, the strike is illegal. Full stop.** The Trump administration keeps trying to have it both ways. They claim we’re “at war” with so-called narco-terrorists when it suits them, but then deny that status when it would require following the laws of war or seeking authorization from Congress. They invent new labels, contradict themselves, and expect no one to ask hard questions. That’s not how democracy works. And it’s not how civilian control of the military is supposed to function. If the administration truly believes these strikes were lawful, it should declassify the footage and let the American people see the truth for themselves. **[If you're with me, sign our petition today calling on the Trump administration to declassify the footage:](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121904635/590972271/-1640494385?refcode=251224_sm_strikes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTRlNThlMS1kY2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oN5TYx5aFbADy2YJqm9ms7qFCtR9UhBSH1TML7CIqoA=&emci=317fc334-80df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=b94e58e1-dce0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769)** | [Sign on](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121904636/590972272/-1640494385?refcode=251224_sm_strikes&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQMjUvMS83NDc1OCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICJiOTRlNThlMS1kY2UwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=oN5TYx5aFbADy2YJqm9ms7qFCtR9UhBSH1TML7CIqoA=&emci=317fc334-80df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=b94e58e1-dce0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=194769)

clean_body: They can contradict themselves all they want. The facts don't change. | | Friend, Last week, I reviewed classified video of U.S. military strikes ordered by the Trump administration off the coast of Venezuela and questioned the Navy admiral responsible for carrying them out. What I saw was deeply disturbing. The administration cannot legally justify these strikes. Not under the Constitution. Not under basic common sense. And not under the standards our military is supposed to follow. In the video, the people targeted were not an imminent threat. They were not helpless, and they were not actively continuing a mission that would justify lethal force. That matters because without those conditions, the strike is illegal. Full stop. The Trump administration keeps trying to have it both ways. They claim we’re “at war” with so-called narco-terrorists when it suits them, but then deny that status when it would require following the laws of war or seeking authorization from Congress. They invent new labels, contradict themselves, and expect no one to ask hard questions. That’s not how democracy works. And it’s not how civilian control of the military is supposed to function. If the administration truly believes these strikes were lawful, it should declassify the footage and let the American people see the truth for themselves. | Seth | | | ---|---|--- About Seth Moulton Seth Moulton is a father, a husband, a Marine, and a Democrat with a mission to bring a new generation of leaders to Congress. He is the proud father of two girls, Emmy and Caroline, and husband to his wife, Liz. They live in Salem, Massachusetts. | = | = ---|--- Follow Seth | | | | ---|---|---|--- Paid for by Seth for Massachusetts Checks may also be mailed to: Seth for Massachusetts - PO Box 2013, Salem, MA, 01970 Email is a critical way to stay in touch with our supporters, but if you wish to unsubscribe, you may do so . Seth for Massachusetts PO Box 2013 Salem, MA 01970 United States

subject: Wishing you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season!
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Chris Taylor for Justice
body:
Thank you for the support, encouragement, and belief you’ve shown in Judge Chris Taylor.
# [](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/18?refcode=em20251224-936&t=1&akid=953%2E294397%2EhVvjZT)
As the year comes to a close, we wanted to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a joyful holiday season — and Judge Chris Taylor’s dog, Ollie, insisted on being part of the festive cheer!
[](https://act.chrisforjustice.com/go/31?c0=em_ms_jct_20251224_1_ak.TUXr9q&amount=10&refcode=em20251224-936&t=3&akid=953%2E294397%2EhVvjZT)
We’re truly grateful to be on this journey with you. Thank you for the support, encouragement, and belief you’ve shown in Judge Chris Taylor.
Serving the people of Wisconsin has been the honor of Judge Chris Taylor’s life — and she continues to approach her work with fairness, integrity, and deep respect for everyone who comes before the court.
From all of us (and one very good dog), thank you for being part of our campaign.
Warmly,
Team Taylor

clean_body: | | | | | Friend, Joanna and I wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas and a happy, healthy holiday season. We hope the days ahead give you time to rest, reflect, and enjoy the company of those who matter most. Thank you for the privilege of serving you. I never take for granted the trust you’ve placed in me to represent our community in Congress. It is an honor, and I’m grateful for your support along the way. Warmest wishes,Brad Knott | | Paid for by Brad Knott for Congress Copyright © 2025 Knott for Congress Our mailing address is: Brad Knott for Congress PO Box 97275 Raleigh, NC 27624 If you would like to donate online, please visit our website . Happy Holidays!

|

| | [](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121912461/590986507/1768444660?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HolidayCard_251224_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDY1ZjlhNS1lMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wyn-pFnEamy8FVMRwzsCHV8YYexzFbA-0IRZxXdgFYA=) Derek,

As we close out another year, my family and I want to take a moment to wish you and your loved ones a very Happy Holidays.

I know the past year has been difficult for so many of us. 2026 will be here before we know it, and let’s be clear – we’ve got a lot of important work in front of us.

But this holiday season, I hope you take some time to slow down and enjoy good food and great company.

[_**I’ve recorded a short holiday message for supporters like you. Please take a moment to watch it.**_](https://click.ngpvan.com/k/121912463/590986508/102774773?refcode=MW_ATA_EM_FR_HolidayCard_251224_T1_1&nvep=ew0KICAiVGVuYW50VXJpIjogIm5ncHZhbjovL3Zhbi9OR1AvTkdQNDAvMS84ODY1NCIsDQogICJEaXN0cmlidXRpb25VbmlxdWVJZCI6ICIzMDY1ZjlhNS1lMWUwLWYwMTEtODE5NS0wMDBkM2ExZDU4YWEiLA0KICAiRW1haWxBZGRyZXNzIjogImRwd2lsbGlzNjdAZ21haWwuY29tIg0KfQ%3D%3D&hmac=Wyn-pFnEamy8FVMRwzsCHV8YYexzFbA-0IRZxXdgFYA=&emci=2ad79da8-71df-f011-8194-000d3a1ec8c6&emdi=3065f9a5-e1e0-f011-8195-000d3a1d58aa&ceid=4568237)

Wherever you are and however you celebrate, I’m wishing you a wonderful holiday season and a very Happy New Year.

— Mark Warner

| Hi Friend — As we pause to celebrate the joy and hope of the season, we want to take a moment to say _thank you_ from the bottom of our hearts. Your friendship, passion, and support has been such a gift to this community and to the work we do together to uphold election integrity and empower citizens across the nation. name: Roy Cooper
subject: I can’t quite wrap my head around it
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Heartland Patriots (LucasKunce
body:
He’s wrong for this country.
Peter, it’s almost unimaginable to me that someone could have the privilege of serving this nation in the United States Senate and decide to serve only their political party.
But that’s what we’re seeing of far too many Republicans in Washington. It’s exactly what we’d get from my opponent if he wins this toss-up race.
He’s not running because he believes that Americans deserve loyalty from their elected leaders. _He said he’s running because President Trump told him to._
**You just can’t be 100% loyal to the people if you’re 100% loyal to a political party or a president.**
Look, at the end of the day, Michael Whatley would not be a Senator for the people. He’d just be another rubber stamp for the MAGA agenda. He’s wrong for this state and our country. We have to defeat him.
**[We’re 7 days out from our final end-of-quarter filing deadline of 2025 — the last before our election year begins. We set a $1 million online fundraising goal. It’s high, but since Whatley has big-money donors and PACs lined up to support him, it’s what we need to raise in order to keep up. I’m personally asking if you can get us started on our goal by splitting a donation of any amount now between our campaign and Heartland Patriots.](https://act.lucaskunce.com/go/98669?refcode=em20251224-9855&firstname=Peter&lastname=Willis&email=dpwillis67@gmail.com&zip=18326&city=Cresco&state=PA&amounts=5%2C20%2C50%2C100%2C250%2C500%2C1000&t=1&akid=9855%2E614464%2E1O_fRN)**
Can’t do this without you,
Roy Cooper

| [](https://www.facebook.com/lucaskuncemo/) | [](https://twitter.com/lucaskuncemo) | [](https://www.instagram.com/lucaskuncemo/)

| | | |

name: Roy Cooper
subject: Hate to bother you during the holidays, but I have to make a personal request
body:
We’re concerned about making sure we meet our goal.
|
# [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2365?source=&t=1&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
I’m going to keep this as short as possible considering the holiday, Peter. Our team set our biggest fundraising goal yet for this final end-of-quarter deadline of 2025. We need to raise $1 million online before the year ends. But fundraising often slows down (very understandably) during the holiday season, and I know my finance folks are concerned about making sure we hit this target. **[We won't be bothering you with financial requests tomorrow, but I’m personally asking if you could give today. Even a small amount will help make sure we have the resources to stay competitive in this toss-up race.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3245?t=7&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)** Thank you very much, and Merry Christmas, Roy Cooper [](https://act.roycooper.com/go/3245?t=8&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
* * *
Democrat Roy Cooper is running for U.S. Senate to help take back the Majority for Democrats. North Carolina is Democrats’ best chance to flip a seat from red to blue — the path to stopping Republicans in Washington starts here.

National Republicans will target North Carolina as a key battleground and invest heavily in defeating us.

Cooper is a former state legislator, Attorney General, and most recently Governor of North Carolina. North Carolina will be the most competitive Senate election of 2026, and Cooper enters the race as the most formidable candidate of either party.

Cooper’s signature achievements include helping to expand Medicaid and helping make NC the top state for business by creating thousands of jobs and growing the clean energy economy.

**[Donate today to help win this seat and flip the Senate blue.](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=2&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)** | [DONATE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1914?source=&t=3&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
---
[DONATE MONTHLY](https://act.roycooper.com/go/1915?source=&t=4&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
[SHOP OUR MERCH STORE](https://act.roycooper.com/go/2133?t=5&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
[info@roycooper.com](mailto:info@roycooper.com) | [Privacy Policy](https://act.roycooper.com/go/825?t=6&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
Cooper Victory Fund
PO Box 1190
Raleigh, NC 27602
Paid for by Cooper Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Cooper for North Carolina, DSCC, and North Carolina Democratic Party — Federal.
---
Contributions or gifts to Cooper Victory Fund are not tax deductible.
The first $7,000 of each contribution from a person and the first $10,000 from a multicandidate committee (“PAC”) will be allocated to Cooper for North Carolina. The first $3,500 of a person’s contribution and the first $5,000 of a PAC’s contribution will be designated for the primary election; the next $3,500/$5,000 will be designated for the general election. The next $10,000 from a person and $5,000 from a PAC will be allocated to North Carolina Democratic Party – Federal. The next $44,300 of a contribution from a person and the next $15,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC General Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Headquarters Fund. The next $132,900 from a person and the next $45,000 from a PAC will be allocated to the DSCC Legal Fund. A contributor may designate his or her contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if following it would result in an excessive contribution.
Any donor history information in this email reflects what we have on file for this specific email address. If you have donated with a different email address, with a check, or with a spouse — thank you so much! We have that on file and cannot thank you enough for supporting this campaign.
By clicking the links above, you certify that you are responsible for paying all charges incurred in using the debit or credit card to be charged, and that your personal funds will be the true source of the contribution.

[You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time.](http://act.roycooper.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)
If you wish to receive fewer messages from us, [submit this form to let us know.](https://act.roycooper.com/signup/i-want-less-emails-cooper-north-carolina/?t=9&akid=208%2E124072%2EqJX8IG)

name: Bryce Reeves
subject: The Principle That Guides My Life, Friend – It’s Important.
body:
Washington is full of talkers. Virginia needs a doer.

| | | | [ ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/d3v0ns2l_hftimztb3ddu/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gqkh_0DYqhJ365-3YOIRxJj/35xs2bBdKcfM1HqeRbHQ_P-y7cy4k_VgeQV1hFvOk3t1lUAZze9bxZrUztvy-k2btXi_N6Tfj7MHGmJgkLXYqavITUkrLpEKDgRI6xzevnddY-jhsi2_tUtpvojZkEfm-B0DFIPJ2E0PdtTwpV-1dQRcEhil0GtlULQoHKGNrBN_twCS1D_5Gc1bwBise1yf-BtfG3NnjpvjfESXbBf9r0pPiD6wi29-LesZgDV4oK5POnKktWSRuBvDrFahmHp0vNG7dWKpl1p73qPPEyZ39TcLe_rnNnbCxs0D11NLpyoW9La-dfziCQSZbAxyr_UXfaevq41XItKMcd3iylPyX57Um0GivC3RmpOpjFG_kYQIlDc0)
---
| | Friend, I’ve lived my entire life by one principle: **You can’t talk it up. You have to put it up.** That’s what I carried with me as an Army Ranger. That’s what guided me as a narcotics detective. And it's what drives me every day as a Virginia State Senator. **Service isn’t about speeches – it’s about action. Leadership isn’t about promises – it’s about results.** And right now, Washington is overflowing with people who talk big and deliver little.
---
| | | [ STAND WITH REEVES ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/90zcyslvnj7jn4wqiflod/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gqkh_0DYqhJ365-3YOIRxJj/35xs2bBdKcfM1HqeRbHQ_P-y7cy4k_VgeQV1hFvOk5rFYk4-m_VFT2ch7zFjW0OTNt1Kg3mmO7CX5DpAlYjR80oamUmSPcuZodcy_CqWbLCXk6KoSZpKODHT3D0ioD7nlVvGXdaZjDkaVWeL21Gz4KQ083RZZRIdUYlca49IBq29eJACdyOiBoI763fYBiVPetoNnKvBC3MdvR66QuPHzfHeF9pecpZtaq7jcfrm8qAbvAHs7hbvlYTjTDlbxtZa_cD-tuqpM0rPrVe7eX_P6fPcB92mkdd39IvS3w7O6G2GTt_BLtmlAodAro1BRG1iqz1LMSSi2p9unpaxCp3N4a2mK04WztcGX6ciaSCHjvbwhGIt)
---
| | After decades in the Senate, Mark Warner has become exactly the kind of politician Virginians are tired of: someone who puts politics first and results last. That’s why I’m running. Virginia deserves a U.S. Senator who will take the fight head-on, defend our conservative values, and work with President Trump to get real results for our families, our economy, and our future.
---
| | | [ SUPPORT REEVES FOR U.S. SENATE ](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/wqrzjw3zegatcxqqn_4td/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gqkh_0DYqhJ365-3YOIRxJj/35xs2bBdKcfM1HqeRbHQ_P-y7cy4k_VgeQV1hFvOk7pFNcvsCj855m6mp-elym6pDjBemqC3oZy-bMCHGvAkDoJfRi70mXm0CTFqMZUfFy4gxkumQWdNCo0ch1twCcb8kEo-_287-N6C6tAcF0-KCkZCxl4CTVxuR2EZ6-dmkN0HOYLe1lpMVvQmdrKHa3LaGrmvBXUB67HdxWW-igz4GP7_k4vL71jxZKELHvhB6-UhyoazQOItD8WCzDwr4qSafXf7Qsn3PMRwfBRNQrx4vc-uAqYfrShXgortdoKR_6TA08CxMvXjYcA7oLpVaihsT-CZ7oIgY1i9gyDe35IWjhf-29rdf_zOWaOvuhKC3naUTX9A)

| | I’m not in this to make noise. I’m in this to make a difference. But to take this fight to the next level, I need you standing with me from the start. [**_Will you add your name today to become a founding supporter of our campaign? >>>_**](https://links.email.brycereeves.com/els/v4/skc70hyffyxwon9ay9q1y/Yy3HiX6lUEDmvhuW3nb2D2dnExst2EzIWmuF2Ta-5634_Gqkh_0DYqhJ365-3YOIRxJj/35xs2bBdKcfM1HqeRbHQ_P-y7cy4k_VgeQV1hFvOk_hpHCetFUxOPt2RTf_IXLXjQ9Gcyn67lWEoGXj5wVUOWNYxpjNhmilbDTEvR0akTd8-GpQ5QC-DtIgmtb3RKgczURlCXowxRO4nVt_Gg2hadtUdUFj710T6opKTyXP8icnKIWCBvmldcKoQIybUaXMtYpTXIxSClyODGMVMJKHAtHfDz_ClA4XT2-0nOA13ZbE57dFx-qFrB4KmZAnO6ti1VkHF3OPp6y3Zig6vjws6IqV4gzhCmCfA4GpWNRMO9k8oJVjsYso6Wgg0_jSkd0r7EuCE1-1ybhRGzBt7Jn4plQpSzIIT8YP7Jnyy73bEtJpLJBXN)

clean_body: Washington is full of talkers. Virginia needs a doer. | | | | | | Friend, I’ve lived my entire life by one principle: You can’t talk it up. You have to put it up. That’s what I carried with me as an Army Ranger. That’s what guided me as a narcotics detective. And it's what drives me every day as a Virginia State Senator. Service isn’t about speeches – it’s about action. Leadership isn’t about promises – it’s about results. And right now, Washington is overflowing with people who talk big and deliver little. | | | | | After decades in the Senate, Mark Warner has become exactly the kind of politician Virginians are tired of: someone who puts politics first and results last. That’s why I’m running. Virginia deserves a U.S. Senator who will take the fight head-on, defend our conservative values, and work with President Trump to get real results for our families, our economy, and our future. | | | | | I’m not in this to make noise. I’m in this to make a difference. But to take this fight to the next level, I need you standing with me from the start. | | | | | Thank you for stepping up and believing in a higher standard of leadership – one built on action, integrity, and service. With gratitude, Bryce ReevesCandidate for U.S. Senate (VA) | | | | =

name: Team Kelly
subject: Thank you.
disclaimer_text: Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
body:
It's been quite a year. After Desert Storm and the space program, I thought I had left the risky jobs behind me.
#

Hey, it’s Mark Kelly.
I know it’s Christmas Eve, and I know you’ve got better things to do than read emails from people like me. Still, I wanted to reach out.
It's been quite a year. After Desert Storm and the space program, I thought I had left the risky jobs behind me. Then Elon Musk called me a traitor, Roger Stone threatened my life, and Donald Trump called for my arrest and hanging. Pretty crazy stuff.
Flying over Kuwait, or commanding the space shuttle, I never would’ve imagined any of that would ever happen. But, here we are.
In the Navy and NASA, I was always lucky to have a team of really good people backing me up. They got me through some tough situations. And today, I know I am incredibly lucky to have you on my team.
I am really, truly grateful for everything you’ve done for me. It means the world to me, and I won’t forget it.
Thank you.
Now, time to go play with my granddaughter.
Merry Christmas, and happy holidays.
Mark
[](https://act.markkelly.com/go/1389?c0=.0B8tYu&refcode=em251224-1-90&t=1&akid=6310%2E6688874%2EQddO0-)

Paid For By Mark Kelly for Senate
This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is a very important way we communicate with supporters like you, but if you want to, you can [ unsubscribe here](https://act.markkelly.com/unsubscribe/unsubscribe?t=2&akid=6310%2E6688874%2EQddO0-).
Mark Kelly was a Captain in the U.S. Navy and astronaut. Use of his military rank, job titles and photographs in uniform does not imply endorsement by the Department of the Navy or Department of Defense and reference to NASA does not imply endorsement by the National Aeronautics and Space Administration.

Hey team.
Vann and I wanted to share our holiday card with you. 🎄

**HAPPY HOLIDAYS AND HAPPY NEW YEAR, ROANOKE!** As 2025, comes to a close I wanted to thank Roanoke for another great year! As always, it is the honor of a lifetime to represent Roanoke in the General Assembly. Next month, as we head to Richmond to prepare for the 2026 legislative session, I look forward to introducing legislation that will benefit Roanoke & all of Virginia. Let's make 2026 a year of progress, collaboration, & growth for our community!
---
|
---
|

**BUCHANAN CHRISTMAS EVE LUMINARY DISPLAY - Dec. 24** Buchanan invites all to discover "the Town that Glows with LOVE tonight during the Town's annual, Christmas Eve Luminary Display! This annual display started after the flood of 1985 in appreciation of the love by the town people. Volunteers started this spectacular luminary display to say "thank you," and repeat this incredible display each Christmas Eve.

The Kwanzaa Celebration begins December 26th, and ends January 1st. ~ | NEW YEAR'S EVE CELEBRATION AT TAUBMAN MUSEUM OF ART - Dec. 31 Ring in the New Year with an unforgettable night at the Taubman Museum of Art! This dazzling celebration is the perfect way to welcome 2026 while kicking off the Museum's momentous 75th Anniversary Year. | FIRST DAY HIKES AT VA STATE PARKS - Jan. 1 Start the New Year with a visit to one of Virginia's 44 State Parks on January 1. Taking a hike to inspire those New Year resolutions centered on getting or keeping fit is the perfect family-friendly activity. There are many hikes and opportunities to choose from, or you can visit a park of your choosing and create your own special First Day Hike. ~ | Community Resources | COMMUNITY OFFICE HOURS VIRTUAL OFFICE HOURS WITH DEL. RASOUL'S TEAM Our office is now holding virtual office hours to meet with constituents. Meet with a member of Delegate Sam Rasoul's team to ask questions, share concerns, or get help with state-related issues. We're here to listen and assist however we can. ~~ | | KNOW YOUR RIGHTS WITH ICE There have been recent reports of ICE throughout the state. The ACLU has created a collection of resources in the case you or someone you know interacts with ICE agents. Read and share the resources found ~~. ~~ | CONTACT YOUR FEDERAL REPRESENTATIVE In many ways, it feels like our federal government is under attack by the current administration. While our office is happy to assist however we can, it is still crucial that you engage our federal representatives. Find the contact information for the Virginia Congressional Delegation ~~. ~~ | JOIN THE ROANOKE CITY DEMOCRATS! RCDC's monthly business meeting is the third Thursday each month. Watch their Facebook for an upcoming announcement of the agenda. The meetings are available virtually for those who write to mailto:info@roanokedemocrats.com, requesting the link. ~~ | JOIN ROANOKE YOUNG DEMS! Meetings occur on the second Monday of every month in person and virtually. The goal of RYD is to help improve our community and to promote the names of Democratic candidates and policies. Contact: mailto:youngdemocratsroanoke@gmail.com to get involved! | BUILDING BELOVED COMMUNITIES Building Beloved Communities helps nonprofits and government agencies step into 2026 with clarity and confidence - whether it's bringing your annual report to life, guiding strategic planning, or supporting your team with resilience and leadership tools. mailto:info@buildingbelovedcommunities.com "mailto:info@buildingbelovedcommunities.com" and set your organization up for the years ahead. ~~ | Thank you for your support! If you have any questions, please do not hesitate to reach out to me anytime. My very best, | Del. Sam Rasoul | "Facebook" "X" "Instagram" "YouTube" "Bluesky" Paid for and Authorized By Friends of Sam Rasoul for Delegate P.O. Box 13842 Roanoke, VA 24037 United States |

body:
The lawsuit the Supreme Court agreed to hear isn't about fairness. It's not about so-called "election integrity," because millions of taxpayers' dollars have been wasted on state investigations looking for mail-in ballot fraud that simply does not exist.
This lawsuit is a political ploy to suppress legitimate mail-in ballots that are postmarked by Election Day and potentially delayed by the U.S. Postal Service. This lawsuit targets our fellow citizens who have done nothing wrong and might have their vote suppressed through delays out of their control. And it's all because the political party that brought the lawsuit knows that those delayed ballots are more likely to have been cast by voters for the other party and not themselves.
We cannot let anyone get away with such a cynical attempt at hidden voter suppression, no matter who controls the Supreme Court. RUSH $25 or more right now to help us spread the word about this lawsuit and defend the right to vote across the country >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122425_1&amount=25]
Voter Action Project [https://voteractionproject.org/]
DemDocket: SCOTUS to Hear GOP Lawsuit That Could Radically Restrict Mail Voting [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122425_1&amount=25]
Team: Mail-in ballots are under attack again.
The Supreme Court agreed to hear arguments in RNC v. Wetzel, a lawsuit challenging Mississippi’s law allowing a five-day grace period for late-arriving ballots mailed by Election Day. In simpler terms, it's a case about whether your vote will count if you mail it on or before Election Day, but your ballot arrives after Election Day.
It's clear why a political party -- in this case, the Republican National Committee (RNC) -- is claiming that states must reject ballots that arrive after Election Day. Doing so would potentially disenfranchise a large number of voters, restricting the number of participants in an election. And the data is clear, over the last several election cycles, Republicans have been outnumbered in the use of mail-in ballots.
The RNC is making a blunt decision that their ability to win elections matters more than your vote. It's a cynical attempt to stay in power by suppressing ballots that are delivered late by the postal service. It's the kind of partisan work that shows they'd rather believe in their own power and control than the principles of democracy, of a country where all our votes should count, regardless of party.
Team: We cannot allow blatant partisanship to overrule our right to vote. Help make every mail-in ballot count in Mississippi and beyond with $25 or whatever you can today to make every voice heard in our elections >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122425_1&amount=25]
GIVE $15 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122425_1&amount=15] GIVE $25 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122425_1&amount=25]
GIVE $50 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122425_1&amount=50] GIVE $100 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122425_1&amount=100]
GIVE $250 NOW ➜ [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?express_lane=true&refcode=122425_1&amount=250] OTHER AMOUNT [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122425_1&amount=35]
Our position is clear: If your ballot was postmarked by Election Day, it should count.
This shouldn't be a partisan question. No political party -- Democrat, Republican, Green, Working Families, Libertarian, Reform, Conservative -- should be against voting. No party in our democracy should want to restrict the fundamental right of our fellow citizens to make their voice heard through voting.
But now we're facing a case where the Supreme Court’s decision could strike down or uphold laws in 16 states (and Washington D.C.) allowing late-arriving ballots postmarked on or before Election Day to be counted if they arrive within a set grace period.
How do we know what is at stake? Data from the 2024 Massachusetts elections shows that their three-day grace period for ballots to arrive after Election Day resulted in a 60% drop in rejected ballots as compared to no grace period. That means thousands of votes still counted, more than 1.5% of the total vote count. In a close election, that 1.5% could easily mean the difference between winning and losing.
Our fundamental right to vote should matter so much more than a partisan desperation to win. Chip in $25 or whatever you can to help us defend the use of mail-in ballots and make every vote count in elections nationwide >> [http://secure.actblue.com/donate/ifvap-power?refcode=122425_1&amount=25]
https://voteractionproject.org/ [https://voteractionproject.org/]
https://www.facebook.com/voteraction [https://www.facebook.com/voteraction] https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org [https://bsky.app/profile/voteractionproject.org] https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/ [https://www.instagram.com/voteractionproj/] https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/ [https://www.linkedin.com/company/voter-action-project/]
Integrity First Voter Action Project is dedicated to expanding ballot access and increasing voter participation across the country.
Since the Supreme Court gutted key provisions in the Voting Rights Act, extreme politicians have taken advantage to pass harsh laws that restrict access to the ballot box. These restrictions particularly affect disadvantaged communities and people of color. It’s our goal to bring awareness to these laws wherever they may crop up and organize voters to take action to ensure the right to vote is available to everyone in their states and communities.
Your support is crucial to our efforts. Will you donate today to help us protect voting rights? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122425_1&amount=20]
Donate Now [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/integrity-first-voter-action-project-1?refcode=122425_1&amount=20]
Contributions or gifts to Integrity First Voter Action Project are not tax-deductible as charitable contributions or as business expenses under IRC Section 162(3). Integrity First Voter Action Project is organized and operates under section 501(c)(4) of the Internal Revenue Code.
A copy of Integrity First Voter Action Project's latest financial report may be obtained by mail at Integrity First Voter Action Project, c/o Mele Brengarth & Assoc, PO Box 15845, Washington, DC 20003.

Peter, I'm pissed!
Jack Schlossberg here — candidate for Congress in NY-12. Donald Trump just announced he's going to rename the Kennedy Center after HIMSELF.
Will you help send me to Congress to stand up to his dictator B.S. by splitting a donation between my campaign and The Real Texas PAC? [https://secure.actblue.com/donate/rtp-2025-jack?refcode=122425_1]
This isn't the first time Trump has tried to erase my grandfather President Kennedy's legacy, and it won't be the last.
I want to fight for the things that ACTUALLY matter in Congress — things like health care, the environment, and affordable housing. I'll have zero part in propping up Trump's narcissism.

name: Squad Victory Fund
subject: Happy holidays, Peter
body:
[ https://act.squadvictoryfund.com/go/18910?refcode=em20251224-1761-foote&t=1001&akid=1761%2E342411%2EQ6Msue ]Squad Victory Fund

Peter,

As the year comes to a close, we want to take a moment to say something
simple but important: thank you.

This year, your support has made all the difference. Your energy, your
voice, and your commitment have powered a movement that refuses to back
down. Because of you, we can keep showing up for the people who sent us to
Congress — working-class families who deserve a government that works for
them, not for corporate interests or the political establishment.

Every action you’ve taken, every donation you’ve given, every conversation
you’ve had with friends and neighbors — it all matters. It all adds up. It
all strengthens this movement from the ground up. This movement is at its
strongest when the people lead the way, and you prove that truth
constantly.

We’re so grateful for your trust, your courage, and your belief in a
government that serves everyone and policies rooted in justice. It’s
because of you that we can continue fighting for bold progressive change,
and for a future where everyone has a fair shot at opportunity and
security.

This holiday season, we hope you take a moment to celebrate the impact
you’ve had and the difference you’ve made. Your dedication keeps this
movement alive, growing, and winning. We couldn’t do it without you, and
we are so grateful that you are standing with us.

From all of us, we wish you and your loved ones joy, health, and hope as
we enter a new year full of promise. Thank you for being part of this
fight, and thank you for helping us start 2026 stronger than ever.

With gratitude and solidarity,

The Squad Victory Fund

This email was sent to dpwillis67@gmail.com. Email is the most important way for us to reach you about opportunities to get involved. If you need to remove yourself from our email list, click here to unsubscribe:

You can unsubscribe from this mailing list at any time:
http://act.squadvictoryfund.com/cms/unsubscribe/unsubscribe/?akid=1761%2E342411%2EQ6Msue

Paid for by The Squad Victory Fund, a joint fundraising committee authorized by Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

In addition to what’s legally required, The Squad Victory Fund does not accept contributions from: (1) corporations, associations, or their PACs; (2) individuals registered as federal lobbyists or under FARA; (3) from the PACs, lobbyists, or SEC-named executives of fossil fuel companies; or (4) from the Fraternal Order of Police.

Contributions or gifts to The Squad Victory Fund are not tax deductible.

Contributions to The Squad Victory Fund will be allocated equally among: Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, Rashida Tlaib for Congress, Courage to Change, Inspiring Leadership Has a Name PAC, Power of Us PAC, and Rooted in Community Leadership PAC.

Any contributor may designate their contribution for a particular participant. The allocation formula above may change if any contributor makes a contribution that, when allocated, would exceed the amount that the contributor may lawfully give to any participant.

After contributing to The Squad Victory Fund, you will automatically be signed up to receive email updates from Alexandria Ocasio-Cortez for Congress, Ilhan for Congress, The Committee to Elect Ayanna Pressley, and Rashida Tlaib for Congress. You may of course opt-out by unsubscribing at any time.

To contribute via check, please address to The Squad Victory Fund c/o MBA Consulting Group, PO Box 15845, Washington D.C., 20003

Email us: info@squadvictoryfund.com

| | Lifе and death Son of Mykhailo Sulyma, Ivan came from a petty noble (szlachta) family. He was born in Rohoshchi (next to Chernihiv). He served as an estate overseer for Stanisław Żółkiewski and later the family of Daniłowicze who inherited his lands; for that service in 1620 he was awarded three villages: Sulimówka, Kuczakiw and Lebedyn. Аll the villages todаy belong to the Boryspil Raion, Kyiv Oblast. His sons included Stepan (died 1659), a captain of Boryspil company, and Fedir (died 1691), a colonel of Pereiaslav regiment. He became popular among the unregistered Cossacks, leading them on campaigns to plunder Crimea and other Ottoman vassal territories. For organizing a revolt on an Ottoman slave galley and freeing Christian slaves[1] he received a medal from Pope Paul V himself. Eventually, Sulyma reached the rank of the hetman, which he held from 1628 to 1629 and 1630 to 1635. In 1635, after returning from an expedition to Black Sea against the Ottomans, he decided to rebel against the Polish–Lithuanian Commonwealth, which at that time controlled most of the Cossack territories, and whose nobility was trying to turn militant Cossacks into serfs.[citation needed] Ivan Sulyma took part in numerous campaigns of Sagaidachny against Tatars and Turks. In particular, it was the famous capture of Kafa (modern Theodosia), the main center of the slave trade on the Black Sea, Trapezont, Izmail, and also two attacks on Tsaregrad. On the night of 3 to 4 August 1635 he took the newly constructed Kodak fortress by surprise, burning it and executing its crew of about 200 people under Jean Marion. Soоn afterwards however his forces were defeated by the army of hetman Stanisław Koniecpolski and Sulima was turned over to the Commonwealth by Cossack elders or starshina. Together with several other leaders of his rebellion, Hetman Sulyma was executed in Warsaw on 12 December 1635. At first, the Polish King Władysław IV Waza, known for his friendly attitude towards the Cossacks, was hesitant to execute Sulyma, especially since he was a person upon whom the Pope himself bestowed his medal. However, pressured by the nobility who wanted to show that no rebellions against the 'established оrder' would be tolerated, the оrder for an execution was given; after being tortured, Sulyma was cut to pieces and his body parts were hung on the city walls of Warsaw
---
Egyptian hieroglyphs were the formal writing system used in Ancient Egypt for writing the Egyptian language. Hieroglyphs combined logographic, syllabic and alphabetic elements, with some 1,000 distinct characters.[3][4] Cursive hieroglyphs were used for religious literature on papyrus and wood. The later hieratic and demotic Egyptian scripts were derived from hieroglyphic writing, as was the Proto-Sinaitic script that later evolved into the Phoenician alphabet.[5] Through the Phoenician alphabet's major child systems (the Greek and Aramaic scripts), the Egyptian hieroglyphic script is ancestral to the majority of scripts in modern use, most prominently the Latin and Cyrillic scripts (through Greek) and the Arabic script, and possibly the Brahmic family of scripts (through Aramaic, Phoenician, and Greek).[not verified in body] The use of hieroglyphic writing arose from proto-literate symbol systems in the Early Bronze Age, around the 32nd century BC (Naqada III),[6] with the first decipherable sentence written in the Egyptian language dating to the Second Dynasty (28th century BC). Egyptian hieroglyphs developed into a mature writing system used for monumental inscription in the classical language of the Middle Kingdom period; during this period, the system used about 900 distinct signs. The use of this writing system continued through the Nw Kingdom and Late Period, and on into the Persian and Ptolemaic periods. Late survivals of hieroglyphic use are found well into the Roman period, extending into the 4th century AD.[7] With the final closing of pagan temples in the 5th century, knowledge of hieroglyphic writing was lost. Although attempts were made, the script remained undeciphered throughout the Middle Ages and the early modern period. The decipherment of hieroglyphic writing was finally accomplished in the 1820s by Jean-François Champollion, with the help of the Rosetta Stone.[8] The number of words contained in al Ancient Egyptian (i.e. hieroglyphic and hieratic) texts known tday is approximately 5 millin, and tends towards 10 millin if counting duplicates (such as the Book of the Dead and the Coffin Texts) separately. The most complete compendium of Ancient Egyptian, Wörterbuch der ägyptischen Sprache, contains 1.5–1.7 millin words.[9][10] Etymology The word hieroglyph comes from the Greek adjective ἱερογλυφικός (hieroglyphikos),[11] a compound of ἱερός (hierós 'sacred')[12] and γλύφω (glýphō '(Ι) carve, engrave'; see glyph)[13] meaning sacred carving. The glyphs themselves, since the Ptolemaic period, were called τὰ ἱερογλυφικὰ [γράμματα] (tà hieroglyphikà [grámmata]) "the sacred engraved letters", the Greek counterpart to the Egyptian expression of mdw.w-nṯr "god's words".[14] Greek ἱερόγλυφος meant "a carver of hieroglyphs".[15] In English, hieroglyph as a noun is recorded from 1590, originally short for nominalized hieroglyphic (1580s, with a plural hieroglyphics), from adjectival use (hieroglyphic character).[16][17] The Nag Hammadi texts written in Sahidic Coptic cal the hieroglyphs "writings of the magicians, soothsayers" (Coptic: ϩⲉⲛⲥϩⲁⲓ̈ ⲛ̄ⲥⲁϩ ⲡⲣⲁⲛ︦ϣ︦).[18]

[Pledge your support](https://substack..eOaqYJScjThMuhTgH1DIJoL_Fa-HTZpF4e8P03ER_2Q?&utm_medium=email&utm_source=subscribe-widget&utm_content=182513654)
[Share](https://substack.com/app-link/post?publication_id=1454853&post_id=182513654&utm_source=substack&utm_medium=email&utm_content=share&utm_campaign=email-share&action=share&triggerShare=true&isFreemail=true&r=1hvr60&token=eyJ1c2VyX2lkIjo5MDUwMTE5MiwicG9zdF9pZCI6MTgyNTEzNjU0LCJpYXQiOjE3NjY1OTYyNDksImV4cCI6MTc2OTE4ODI0OSwiaXNzIjoicHViLTE0NTQ4NTMiLCJzdWIiOiJwb3N0LXJlYWN0aW9uIn0.fZdpBQyv2WxCzUUHJRsw_WTvHmvfu16J892Wj9v1ohQ)
Governor Lamont, Attorney General Tong and their herd of green energy fanatics have engaged in a process of destroying local government under the guise of making housing more affordable under HB8002.
Thanks to a Progressive Democrat Governor and the Democrat Supermajority at the Statehouse, they have rammed this possibly unconstitutional bill through the State Legislature.
But if they were truly interested in affordable housing and economic growth the last thing they should be supporting is unaffordable electric rates. **If you look at the prices of your electric bill and you aren 't shocked - LOOK AGAIN.**
Connecticut's electric rates that are among the highest in the nation. **Windmills will only increase those rates if we are forced to** **use offshore wind generated electricity.**
Affordability is on the agenda (especially in winter months) and there is a sharp demand for affordable electricity for power data centers, AI, quantum computing and bitcoin mining. These important growth industries also need water to cool the heat they generate and cheap and require abundant electricity to power them.
**Connecticut has the water, but Governor Lamont is making sure that we don 't have the cheap electricity to power them and there are others on the Federal Level like Sen. Blumenthal that claim that this offshore wind from Revolution Wind will bring costs down.**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/0bfe1f00-09a7-4c9f-8ef6-76fcac7e01e0?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
Under the Lamont and Tong Regime, Connecticut will NEVER be able to attract these industries to locate here.
**Pull out your Electricity Bill - Here is a Primer With A Generic Bill**
| [](https://substack.com/redirect/e81425b9-0973-4210-b527-36a417078c87?j=eyJ1IjoiMWh2cjYwIn0.VBabVq-VHATXCJqsddI7uMpdiTm0WkVanRDZfvCWMkg)|
---|---|---
**More Pain at the Plug**
The first column on your bill is "Supply". This is the cost paid to Eversource to generate the electricity and it is 9.748 cents per KWH. At that price Eversource is making a profit on selling the customer electricity. Millstone, our nuclear power plant supplies electricity at 4.999 cents per KWH and that is a fixed price for the next 20 years. Yet, all the Democrat legislators blame Millstone for our high electricity costs. Without Millstone our electricity would be less green and more expensive.
Building new nuclear power plants are expensive, but they are coming down with new technology and a modernized regulatory framework. Once operational, nuclear plants can now produce electricity at a lower cost than fossil fuels at 2-4 cents per KWH.
**Offshore Platform Wind generated electricity is an Economic Disaster.**
According to the November, 2024 report of the National Renewable Energy Laboratory, the cost of Offshore Platform Generated Electricity is 18.1 cents per KWH or 13 cents more per KWH than Millstone. Land Based Wind Generated Electricity costs are 4.2 cents per KWH. We in Connecticut have made the wrong choice, for wind based generation of electricity. This does not include any potential damage and repairs that a massive hurricane or nor-easter could cause.
President Trump was right to shut this down. Based on the latest Eversource bill, the average cost per KWH with all the components of the bill hovered around 26.74 cents per kwh. If 25% of our electricity came from offshore wind without a mark up by Eversource our electricity bill would increase by 12.4% and with a mark up it could be as high as 20%.
NYC is pushing for full green buildings and the removal of any heat from fossil fuels in their latest laws that require all HVAC and hot water by electricity. Combining that retrofit the wind generated electricity surcharge, most New Yorkers could have monthly energy costs that exceed monthly mortgage payments.
Offshore wind and other green energy policies of the progressive left will destroy the economy of Connecticut. There are rational green energy policies that can stimulate economic growth, keep our carbon footprint down, and bring prosperity to Connecticut. One of those is increased nuclear.
The more you know about Offshore Wind Generated Electricity the less you want it. There is a reason that Offshore Wind has been suspended for national security reasons and many others as these projects do not make CT more affordable.
**Attorney General Tong should drop his lawsuit and let us cut our losses. The real green energy revolution is Nuclear.**
Please Share and Subscribe - We need mote Sensible Energy Revolutionaries - Not Revolution Wind.

name: Jay Jones
subject: From my family to yours
disclaimer_text: Paid for by Jay Jones for Virginia
body:
Jay and Mavis Jones [https://prod.cdn.everyaction.com/images/van/NGP/NGP59/1/108618/images/unnamed%20-%202025-09-23T110738.218.png]
Happy holidays, folks! 🎄
From my family to yours, I hope you have a season filled with happiness, warmth, and celebration.
The holiday season is a time for us to treasure our loved ones and reflect on what's most important in life. This year, I have so much to be grateful for – including you .
Your support for our campaign has made this year truly special. I have had the privilege of meeting countless Virginians across the state and being elected Attorney General. I can't thank you enough for being part of this team and believing in our mission to make the lives of every Virginian better.
Now, I can't wait for what we'll accomplish together in the New Year.
So before I get swept away in holiday festivities, let me wish you and your family a very Merry Christmas and happy holidays!
Warmly,
Jay

Jay Jones for Virginia
1490-5A Quarterpath Road, #195
Williamsburg, VA 23185
United States

subject: This isn’t a drill. They’re coming after MAGA.
